'</u>',\n  // reset underscore\n  '29': '</del>' // reset delete\n};\n\n[0, 21, 22, 27, 28, 39, 49].forEach(function (n) {\n  _closeTags[n] = '</span>';\n});\n\n/**\n * Converts text with ANSI color text;\n  }\n\n  // Cache opened sequence.\n  var ansiCodes = [];\n  // Replace with markup.\n  var ret = text.replace(/\\033\\[(\\d+)m/g, function (match, seq) {\n    var ot = _openTags[seq];\n    if 1).join('</span>'));\n  return ret;\n}\n\n/**\n * Customize colors.\n * @param {Object} colors reference to _defColors\n */\nansiHTML.setColors = function (colors) {\n  if (typeof colors !== 'object') (!hex) {\n      _finalColors[key] = _defColors[key];\n      continue;\n    }\n    if ('reset' === key) {\n      if (typeof hex === 'string') {\n        hex = [hex];\n      }\n      if (!Array.isArray(hex) || hex.length === 0 || hex.some(function (h) {\n        return typeof h !== 'string';\n      })) {\n        throw new Error('The value of `' + key + '` property must be an Array and each item could only be a hex string, e.g.: FF0000');\n      }\n      var defHexColor = _defColors[key];\n      if (!hex[0]) {\n        hex[0] = defHexColor[0];\n      }\n      if (hex.length === 1 || !hex[1]) {\n        hex = [hex[0]];\n        hex.push(defHexColor[1]);\n      }\n      hex = hex.slice(0, 2);\n    } else if (typeof hex !== 'string') {\n      throw new Error('The value of `' + key + '` property must be a hex string, e.g.: FF0000');\n    }\n    _finalColors[key] = hex;\n  }\n  _setTags(_finalColors);\n};\n\n/**\n * Reset colors.\n */\nansiHTML.reset = function () {\n   this.loading = true;\n    // Add defensive check\n    if (!this.subjectService) {\n      console.error('SubjectService is not initialized');\n      this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\n      this.loading = false;\n      return;\n    }\n    if (this.isTeacher()) {\n      // Teachers see all subjects they teach\n      if (typeof this.subjectService.getMySubjects !== 'function') {\n        console.error('getMySubjects is not a function');\n        this.alertService.error('Service method error');\n        this.loading = false;\n        return;\n      }\n      this.subjectService.getMySubjects().pipe(first()).subscribe({\n        next: subjects => {\n          console.log('Loaded subjects for teacher:', subjects);\n          this.subjects = subjects;\n          this.filterSubjects();\n          this.loading = false;\n        },\n        error: error => {\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\n          this.loading = false;\n        }\n      });\n    } else {\n      // Students see all subjects with enrollment status\n      console.log('Loading subjects for student with ID:', this.account?.AccountId);\n      if (typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\n        console.error('getAll is not a function on subjectService', this.subjectService);\n        this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\n        this.loading = false;\n        return;\n      }\n      this.subjectService.getAll().pipe(first()).subscribe({\n        next: subjects => {\n          console.log('Raw subjects from API:', subjects);\n          // Add isEnrolled flag if not present\n          this.subjects = subjects.map(subject => ({\n            ...subject,\n            isEnrolled: subject.isEnrolled || false\n          }));\n          console.log('Processed subjects:', this.subjects);\n          this.filterSubjects();\n          this.loading = false;\n          // Log enrollment status for debugging\n          const enrolledCount = this.subjects.filter(s =>        this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\n          this.loading = false;\n        }\n      });\n    }\n  }\n  filterSubjects() {\n    if (this.isStudent()) {\n      if (this.viewMode === 'enrolled') {\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled === true);\n        console.log('Enrolled subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\n      } else {\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter(s => !s.isEnrolled);\n        console.log('Available subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\n      }\n    } else {\n      this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects;\n    }\n  }\n  setViewMode(mode) {\n    this.viewMode = mode;\n    this.filterSubjects();\n  }\n  isTeacher() {\n    return this.account?.role === 'Teacher' || this.account?.role === 'Admin';\n  }\n  isStudent() {\n    return this.account?.role === 'Student' || this.account?.role === 'User';\n  }\n  openCreateSubjectModal() {\n    console.log('Opening create subject.description || '',\n      schedule: subject.schedule || '',\n      room: subject.room || ''\n    });\n    this.submitted = false;\n    if (this.modal) {\n      this.modal.show();\n    }\n  }\n  saveSubject() {\n    this.submitted = true;\n    if (this.subjectForm.invalid) {\n      return;\n    }\n    this.submitting = true;\n    if (this.editingSubject) {\n      this.subjectService.update(this.editingSubject.subjectId, this.subjectForm.value).pipe(first()).subscribe({\n        next: response => {\n          console.log('Subject updated:', response);\n          this.alertService.success('Subject updated successfully');\n          this.modal.hide();\n          this.loadSubjects();\n          this.submitting = false;\n        },\n        error: error => {\n          console.error('Error updating subject:', error);\n          this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to update subject');\n          this.submitting = false;\n        }\n      });\n    } else {\n      console.log('Creating subject:', this.subjectForm.value);\n      this.subjectService.create(this.subjectForm.value).pipe(first()).subscribe({\n        next: response => {\n          console.log('Subject created:', response);\n          this.alertService.success('Subject created successfully');\n          this.modal.hide();\n          this.loadSubjects();\n          this.submitting = false;\n        },\n        error: error => {\n          console.error('Error creating subject:', error);\n          this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to create console.log('Enroll response:', response); // Add this log\n          this.alertService.success(`Successfully enrolled in ${subject.subjectName}`);\n          // Force reload from server\n          this.loadSubjects();\n          // Switch to enrolled view\n          if (this.isStudent()) {\n            this.viewMode = 'enrolled';\n          }\n        },\n        error: error => {\n any;\r\n\r\n@Component({\r\n  selector: 'app-subjects',\r\n  templateUrl: './subjects.component.html',\r\n  styleUrls: ['./subjects.component.css']\r\n})\r\nexport class SubjectsComponent implements OnInit, AfterViewInit {\r\n  subjects: any[] = [];\r\n  filteredSubjects: any[] = [];\r\n  loading = true;\r\n  account: Account | null;\r\n  viewMode: 'enrolled' | 'available' = 'enrolled'; // Default to enrolled\r\n  \r\n  // Modal\r\n  modal: any;\r\n  modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n  subjectForm!: FormGroup;\r\n  submitting = false;\r\n  submitted = false;\r\n  editingSubject: any = null;\r\n\r\nconstructor(\r\n  private subjectService: SubjectService,\r\n  private accountService: AccountService,\r\n  private alertService: AlertService,\r\n  private formBuilder: FormBuilder,\r\n  private router: Router\r\n) {\r\n  this.account = this.accountService.accountValue;\r\n  \r\n  // Debug the service\r\n  console.log('SubjectService constructor check:', {\r\n    service: this.subjectService,\r\n    getAllType: typeof this.subjectService?.getAll,\r\n    getAllExists: !!this.subjectService?.getAll,\r\n    getMySubjectsExists: !!this.subjectService?.getMySubjects\r\n  });\r\n  \r\n  // If getAll is missing, try to reassign from window (temporary fix)\r\n  if (this.subjectService && typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n    console.warn('getAll method missing, attempting to fix...');\r\n    // This is a hack - in a real app, we'd need to find the root cause\r\n    setTimeout(() => {\r\n      console.log('Delayed service check:', {\r\n        service: this.subjectService,\r\n        getAll: this.subjectService?.getAll\r\n      });\r\n    }, 1000);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Add to constructor or ngOnInit\r\nngOnInit() {\r\n  console.log('Current logged-in user:', this.account);\r\n  console.log('User AccountId:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n  console.log('User Role:', this.account?.role);\r\n  \r\n  this.initForm();\r\n  this.loadSubjects();\r\n}\r\n\r\n  ngAfterViewInit() {\r\n    this.initializeModal();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initializeModal() {\r\n    const modalElement = document.getElementById('subjectModal');\r\n    if (modalElement) {\r\n      this.modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement, {\r\n        backdrop: 'static',\r\n        keyboard: false\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initForm() {\r\n    this.subjectForm = this.formBuilder.group({\r\n      subjectName: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      subjectCode: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      description: [''],\r\n      schedule: [''],\r\n      room: ['']\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  get f() { return this.subjectForm.controls; }\r\n\r\nloadSubjects() {\r\n  this.loading = true;\r\n  \r\n  // Add defensive check\r\n  if (!this.subjectService) {\r\n    console.error('SubjectService is not initialized');\r\n    this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n    this.loading = false;\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  \r\n  if (this.isTeacher()) {\r\n    // Teachers see all subjects they teach\r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getMySubjects !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getMySubjects is not a function');\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service method error');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getMySubjects()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Loaded subjects for teacher:', subjects);\r\n          this.subjects = subjects;\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  } else {\r\n    // Students see all subjects with enrollment status\r\n    console.log('Loading subjects for student with ID:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n    \r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getAll is not a function on subjectService', this.subjectService);\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getAll()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Raw subjects from API:', subjects);\r\n          \r\n          // Add isEnrolled flag if not present\r\n          this.subjects = subjects.map(subject => ({\r\n            ...subject,\r\n            isEnrolled: subject.isEnrolled || false\r\n          }));\r\n          \r\n          console.log('Processed subjects:', this.subjects);\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n          \r\n          // Log enrollment status for debugging\r\n          const enrolledCount = this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n          console.log(`Student is enrolled in ${enrolledCount} subjects`);\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n  filterSubjects() {\r\n    if (this.isStudent()) {\r\n      if (this.viewMode === 'enrolled') {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => s.isEnrolled === true);\r\n        console.log('Enrolled subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => !s.isEnrolled);\r\n        console.log('Available subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      }\r\n    } else {\r\n      this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  setViewMode(mode: 'enrolled' | 'available') {\r\n    this.viewMode = mode;\r\n    this.filterSubjects();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isTeacher(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Teacher' || this.account?.role === 'Admin';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isStudent(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Student' || this.account?.role === 'User';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  openCreateSubjectModal() {\r\n    console.log('Opening create subject modal');\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = null;\r\n    this.subjectForm.reset();\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (!this.modal) {\r\n      this.initializeModal();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  editSubject(subject: any) {\r\n    console.log('Editing subject:', subject);\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Edit Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = subject;\r\n    this.subjectForm.patchValue({\r\n      subjectName: subject.subjectName,\r\n      subjectCode: subject.subjectCode,\r\n      description: subject.description || '',\r\n      schedule: subject.schedule || '',\r\n      room: subject.room || ''\r\n    });\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  saveSubject() {\r\n    this.submitted = true;\r\n\r\n    if (this.subjectForm.invalid) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    this.submitting = true;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.editingSubject) {\r\n      this.subjectService.update(this.editingSubject.subjectId, this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n            console.log('Subject updated:', response);\r\n            this.alertService.success('Subject updated successfully');\r\n            this.modal.hide();\r\n            this.loadSubjects();\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          },\r\n          error: (error: any) => {\r\n            console.error('Error updating subject:', error);\r\n            this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to update subject');\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          }\r\n        });\r\n    } else {\r\n      console.log('Creating subject:', this.subjectForm.value);\r\n      this.subjectService.create(this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n            console.log('Subject created:', response);\r\n            this.alertService.success('Subject created successfully');\r\n            this.modal.hide();\r\n            this.loadSubjects();\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          },\r\n          error: (error: any) => {\r\n            console.error('Error creating subject:', error);\r\n            this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to create subject');\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          }\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\nenrollSubject(subject: any) {\r\n  if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to enroll in ${subject.subjectName}?`)) {\r\n    console.log('Enrolling in subject:', subject); // Add this log\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.enroll(subject.subjectId)\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (response) => {\r\n          console.log('Enroll response:', response); // Add this log\r\n          this.alertService.success(`Successfully enrolled in ${subject.subjectName}`);\r\n          \r\n {\n  constructor(route, router, http) {\n    this.route = route;\n    this.router = router;\n    this.http = http;\n    this.question = null;\n    this.answers = [];\n    this.loading = true;\n    this.loadingAnswers = true;\n  }\n  ngOnInit() {\n    this.questionId = this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get(\"id\");\n    this.loadQuestion();\n    this.loadAnswers();\n  }\n  loadQuestion() {\n    // Try to get from state first\n    const state = history.state;\n    if (state && state.question) {\n      this.question = state.question;\n    } else {\n      // If not in state, fetch from API\n      this.http.get(`${environment.apiUrl}/classroom/questions/${this.questionId}`).subscribe({\n        next: data => {\n          this.question = data;\n          // Format teacher name if not already formatted\n          if (data.teacher) {\n            this.question.teacherName = `${data.teacher.firstName} ${data.teacher.lastName}`;\n          }\n        },\n        error: err => {\n          console.error(\"Error loading question:\", err);\n        }\n      });\n    }\n  }\n  loadAnswers() {\n    this.loadingAnswers = true;\n    this.http.get(`${environment.apiUrl}/classroom/questions/${this.questionId}/answers`).subscribe({\n      next: data => {\n        this.answers = data;\n        this.loadingAnswers = false;\n        this.loading = false;\n      },\n      error: err => {\n        console.error(\"Error loading answers:\", err);\n        this.loadingAnswers = false;\n        this.loading = false;\n      }\n    });\n  }\n  goBack() {\n    this.router.navigate([\"/classroom\"]);\n  }\n  getRelevanceClass(isRelevant) {\n    return isRelevant ? \"relevant\" : \"not-relevant\";\n  }\n  getRelevanceBadge(isRelevant) \"@environments/environment\";\r\n\r\n@Component({\r\n  templateUrl: \"./view-answers.component.html\",\r\n  styleUrls: [\"./view-answers.component.css\"],\r\n})\r\nexport class ViewAnswersComponent  this.question = state.question;\r\n    } else {\r\n      // If not in state, fetch from API\r\n      this.http\r\n        .get<any>(\r\n          `${environment.apiUrl}/classroom/questions/${this.questionId}`,\r\n        )\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (data) => {\r\n            this.question = data;\r\n            // Format teacher name if not already formatted\r\n            if (data.teacher) {\r\n              this.question.teacherName = `${data.teacher.firstName} ${data.teacher.lastName}`;\r\n            }\r\n true;\r\n    this.http\r\n      .get<\r\n        any[]\r\n      >(`${environment.apiUrl}/classroom/questions/${this.questionId}/answers`)\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (data) => {\r\n err);\r\n          this.loadingAnswers = false;\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        },\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  goBack() {\r\n    this.router.navigate([\"/classroom\"]);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n argsOrArgArray(args);\n  return operate((source, subscriber) => {\n    mergeAll(concurrent)(from([source, ...args], scheduler)).subscribe(subscriber);\n {"ast":null,"code":"import { HttpResponse, HTTP_INTERCEPTORS } from '@angular/common/http';\nimport { of, throwError } from 'rxjs';\nimport { delay, materialize, dematerialize } from 'rxjs/operators';\nimport { Role } from '@app/_models';\nimport * as i0 from \"@angular/core\";\nimport * as i1 from \"@app/_services\";\n// array in local storage for accounts\nconst accountsKey = 'angular-15-signup-verification-boilerplate-accounts';\nlet accounts = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(accountsKey)) || [];\nexport class FakeBackendInterceptor {\n  constructor(alertService) {\n    this.alertService = alertService;\n  }\n  intercept(request, next) {\n    const {\n      url,\n      method,\n      headers,\n      body\n    } = request;\n    const alertService = this.alertService;\n    return handleRoute();\n    function handleRoute() {\n      switch (true) {\n        case url.endsWith('/accounts/authenticate') && method === 'POST':\n          return authenticate();\n        case url.endsWith('/accounts/refresh-token') && method === 'POST':\n          return refreshToken();\n        case url.endsWith('/accounts/revoke-token') && method === 'POST':\n          return revokeToken();\n        case url.endsWith('/accounts/register') && method === 'POST':\n          return register();\n        case url.endsWith('/accounts/verify-email') && method === 'POST':\n          return verifyEmail();\n        case url.endsWith('/accounts/forgot-password') && method === 'POST':\n          return forgotPassword();\n        case url.endsWith('/accounts/validate-reset-token') && method === 'POST':\n          return validateResetToken();\n        case url.endsWith('/accounts/reset-password') && method === 'POST':\n          return resetPassword();\n        case url.endsWith('/accounts') && method === 'GET':\n          return getAccounts();\n        case url.match(/\\/accounts\\/\\d+$/) && method === 'GET':\n          return getAccountById();\n        case url.endsWith('/accounts') && method === 'POST':\n          return createAccount();\n        case url.match(/\\/accounts\\/\\d+$/) && method === 'PUT':\n          return updateAccount();\n        case url.match(/\\/accounts\\/\\d+$/) && method === 'DELETE':\n          return deleteAccount();\n        default:\n          // pass through any requests not handled above\n          return next.handle(request);\n      }\n    }\n    // route functions\n    function authenticate() {\n      const {\n        email,\n        password\n      } = body;\n      const account = accounts.find(x => x.email === email && x.password === password && x.isVerified);\n      if (!account) return error('Email or password is incorrect');\n      // add refresh token to account\n      account.refreshTokens.push(generateRefreshToken());\n      localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n      return ok({\n        ...basicDetails(account),\n        jwtToken: generateJwtToken(account)\n      });\n    }\n    function refreshToken() {\n      const refreshToken = getRefreshToken();\n      if (!refreshToken) return unauthorized();\n      const account = accounts.find(x => x.refreshTokens.includes(refreshToken));\n      if (!account) return unauthorized();\n      // replace old refresh token with a new one and save\n      account.refreshTokens = account.refreshTokens.filter(x => x !== refreshToken);\n      account.refreshTokens.push(generateRefreshToken());\n      localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n      return ok({\n        ...basicDetails(account),\n        jwtToken: generateJwtToken(account)\n      });\n    }\n    function revokeToken() {\n      if (!isAuthenticated()) return unauthorized();\n      const refreshToken = getRefreshToken();\n      const account = accounts.find(x => x.refreshTokens.includes(refreshToken));\n      // revoke token and save\n      account.refreshTokens = account.refreshTokens.filter(x => x !== refreshToken);\n      localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n      return ok();\n    }\n    function register() {\n      const account = body;\n      if (accounts.find(x => x.email === account.email)) {\n        // display email already registered \"email\" in alert\n        setTimeout(() => {\n          alertService.info(`\n                        <h4>Email Already Registered</h4>\n                        <p>Your email ${account.email} is already registered.</p>\n                        <p>If you don't know your password please visit the <a href=\"${location.origin}/account/forgot-password\">forgot password</a> page.</p>\n                        <div><strong>NOTE:</strong> The fake backend displayed this \"email\" so you can test without an api. A real backend would send a real email.</div>\n                    `, {\n            autoClose: false\n          });\n        }, 1000);\n        // always return ok() response to prevent email enumeration\n        return ok();\n      }\n      // assign account id and a few other properties then save\n      account.id = newAccountId();\n      if (account.id === 1) {\n        // first registered account is an admin\n        account.role = Role.Admin;\n      } else {\n        account.role = Role.User;\n      }\n      account.dateCreated = new Date().toISOString();\n      account.verificationToken = new Date().getTime().toString();\n      account.isVerified = false;\n      account.refreshTokens = [];\n      delete account.confirmPassword;\n      accounts.push(account);\n      localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n      // display verification email in alert\n      setTimeout(() => {\n        const verifyUrl = `${location.origin}/account/verify-email?token=${account.verificationToken}`;\n        alertService.info(`\n                    <h4>Verification Email</h4>\n                    <p>Thanks for registering!</p>\n                    <p>Please click the below link to verify your email address:</p>\n                    <p><a href=\"${verifyUrl}\">${verifyUrl}</a></p>\n                    <div><strong>NOTE:</strong> The fake backend displayed this \"email\" so you can test without an api. A real backend would send a real email.</div>\n                `, {\n          autoClose: false\n        });\n      }, 1000);\n      return ok();\n    }\n    function verifyEmail() {\n      const {\n        token\n      } = body;\n      const account = accounts.find(x => !!x.verificationToken && x.verificationToken === token);\n      if (!account) return error('Verification failed');\n      // set is verified flag to true if token is valid\n      account.isVerified = true;\n      localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n      return ok();\n    }\n    function forgotPassword() {\n      const {\n        email\n      } = body;\n      const account = accounts.find(x => x.email === email);\n      // always return ok() response to prevent email enumeration\n      if (!account) return ok();\n      // create reset token that expires after 24 hours\n      account.resetToken = new Date().getTime().toString();\n      account.resetTokenExpires = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();\n      localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n      // display password reset email in alert\n      setTimeout(() => {\n        const resetUrl = `${location.origin}/account/reset-password?token=${account.resetToken}`;\n        alertService.info(`\n                    <h4>Reset Password Email</h4>\n                    <p>Please click the below link to reset your password, the link will be valid for 1 day:</p>\n                    <p><a href=\"${resetUrl}\">${resetUrl}</a></p>\n                    <div><strong>NOTE:</strong> The fake backend displayed this \"email\" so you can test without an api. A real backend would send a real email.</div>\n                `, {\n          autoClose: false\n        });\n      }, 1000);\n      return ok();\n    }\n    function validateResetToken() {\n      const {\n        token\n      } = body;\n      const account = accounts.find(x => !!x.resetToken && x.resetToken === token && new Date() < new Date(x.resetTokenExpires));\n      if (!account) return error('Invalid token');\n      return ok();\n    }\n    function resetPassword() {\n      const {\n        token,\n        password\n      } = body;\n      const account = accounts.find(x => !!x.resetToken && x.resetToken === token && new Date() < new Date(x.resetTokenExpires));\n      if (!account) return error('Invalid token');\n      // update password and remove reset token\n      account.password = password;\n      account.isVerified = true;\n      delete account.resetToken;\n      delete account.resetTokenExpires;\n      localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n      return ok();\n    }\n    function getAccounts() {\n      if (!isAuthenticated()) return unauthorized();\n      return ok(accounts.map(x => basicDetails(x)));\n    }\n    function getAccountById() {\n      if (!isAuthenticated()) return unauthorized();\n      let account = accounts.find(x => x.id === idFromUrl());\n      // user accounts can get own profile and admin accounts can get all profiles\n      if (account.id !== currentAccount().id && !isAuthorized(Role.Admin)) {\n        return unauthorized();\n      }\n      return ok(basicDetails(account));\n    }\n    function createAccount() {\n      if (!isAuthorized(Role.Admin)) return unauthorized();\n      const account = body;\n      if (accounts.find(x => x.email === account.email)) {\n        return error(`Email ${account.email} is already registered`);\n      }\n      // assign account id and a few other properties then save\n      account.id = newAccountId();\n      account.dateCreated = new Date().toISOString();\n      account.isVerified = true;\n      account.refreshTokens = [];\n      delete account.confirmPassword;\n      accounts.push(account);\n body;\n      let account = accounts.find(x => x.id === idFromUrl());\n      // user accounts can update own profile and admin accounts can update all profiles\n      if (account.id !== currentAccount().id && !isAuthorized(Role.Admin)) {\n        return unauthorized();\n      }\n      // only update password if included\n      if (!params.password) {\n        delete params.password;\n      }\n      // don't save confirm password\n      delete params.confirmPassword;\n      // update and save account\n      Object.assign(account, params);\n      localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n      return ok(basicDetails(account));\n    }\n    function deleteAccount() {\n      if (!isAuthenticated()) return unauthorized();\n !isAuthorized(Role.Admin)) {\n        return unauthorized();\n      }\n      // delete account then save\n      accounts = accounts.filter(x => x.id !== idFromUrl());\n     body\n      })).pipe(delay(500)); // delay observable to simulate server api call\n    }\n\n    function error(message) {\n      return throwError(() => ({\n        error: {\n          message\n        }\n      })).pipe(materialize(), delay(500), dematerialize()); // call materialize and dematerialize to ensure delay even if an error is thrown 'Unauthorized'\n        }\n      })).pipe(materialize(), delay(500), dematerialize());\n    }\n    function basicDetails(account) {\n      const {\n        id,\n        title,\n        firstName,\n        lastName,\n        email,\n        role,\n        dateCreated,\n        isVerified\n      } = account;\n      return {\n        id,\n        title,\n        firstName,\n        lastName,\n parseInt(urlParts[urlParts.length - 1]);\n    }\n    function newAccountId() {\n      return accounts.length ? Math.max(...accounts.map(x => x.id)) + 1 : 1;\n    }\n    function currentAccount() {\n      // check if jwt token is in auth header\n      const authHeader = headers.get('Authorization');\n      if (!authHeader?.startsWith('Bearer fake-jwt-token')) return;\n      // check if token is expired\n      const jwtToken = JSON.parse(atob(authHeader.split('.')[1]));\n      const tokenExpired = Date.now() > jwtToken.exp * 1000;\n      if (tokenExpired) return;\n      const account = accounts.find(x => x.id === jwtToken.id);\n      return account;\n    }\n    function generateJwtToken(account) {\n      // create token that expires in 15 minutes\n      const tokenPayload = {\n        exp: Math.round(new Date(Date.now() + 15 * 60 * 1000).getTime() / 1000),\n        id: account.id\n      };\n      return `fake-jwt-token.${btoa(JSON.stringify(tokenPayload))}`;\n    }\n    function generateRefreshToken() {\n      const token = new Date().getTime().toString();\n expires=${expires}; path=/`;\n      return token;\n    }\n    function getRefreshToken() {\n      // get refresh token from cookie\n      return (document.cookie.split(';').find(x => x.includes('fakeRefreshToken')) || '=').split('=')[1];\n    }\n  }\n}\nFakeBackendInterceptor.ɵfac = function FakeBackendInterceptor_Factory(t) {\n  return new (t || PC\\OneDrive\\Documents\\JAVA\\Extra\\offLineBoilerPlateAngular-main\\src\\app\\_helpers\\fake-backend.ts"],"sourcesContent":["import { Injectable } from '@angular/core';\nimport { HttpRequest, HttpResponse, HttpHandler, HttpEvent, HttpInterceptor, HTTP_INTERCEPTORS } from '@angular/common/http';\nimport { Observable, of, throwError } from 'rxjs';\nimport { delay, materialize, dematerialize } from 'rxjs/operators';\n\nimport { AlertService } from '@app/_services';\nimport { Role } from '@app/_models';\n\n\n\n// array in local storage for accounts\nconst accountsKey = 'angular-15-signup-verification-boilerplate-accounts';\nlet accounts: any[] = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(accountsKey)!) || [];\n\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class FakeBackendInterceptor implements HttpInterceptor {\n    constructor(private alertService: AlertService) { }\n\n    intercept(request: HttpRequest<any>, next: HttpHandler): Observable<HttpEvent<any>> {\n        const { url, method, headers, body } = request;\n        const alertService = this.alertService;\n\n        return handleRoute();\n\n        function handleRoute() {\n            switch (true) {\n                case url.endsWith('/accounts/authenticate') && method === 'POST':\n                    return authenticate();\n                case url.endsWith('/accounts/refresh-token') && method === 'POST':\n                    return refreshToken();\n                case url.endsWith('/accounts/revoke-token') && method === 'POST':\n                    return revokeToken();\n                case url.endsWith('/accounts/register') && method === 'POST':\n                    return register();\n                case url.endsWith('/accounts/verify-email') && method === 'POST':\n                    return verifyEmail();\n                case url.endsWith('/accounts/forgot-password') && method === 'POST':\n                    return forgotPassword();\n                case url.endsWith('/accounts/validate-reset-token') && method === 'POST':\n                    return validateResetToken();\n                case url.endsWith('/accounts/reset-password') && method === 'POST':\n                    return resetPassword();\n                case url.endsWith('/accounts') && method === 'GET':\n                    return getAccounts();\n                case url.match(/\\/accounts\\/\\d+$/) && method === 'GET':\n                    return getAccountById();\n                case url.endsWith('/accounts') && method === 'POST':\n                    return createAccount();\n                case url.match(/\\/accounts\\/\\d+$/) && method === 'PUT':\n                    return updateAccount();\n                case url.match(/\\/accounts\\/\\d+$/) && method === 'DELETE':\n                    return deleteAccount();\n                default:\n                    // pass through any requests not handled above\n                    return next.handle(request);\n            }    \n        }\n\n        // route functions\n\n        function authenticate() {\n            const { email, password } = body;\n            const account = accounts.find(x => x.email === email && x.password === password && x.isVerified);\n            \n            if (!account) return error('Email or password is incorrect');\n\n            // add refresh token to account\n            account.refreshTokens.push(generateRefreshToken());\n            localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n\n            return ok({\n                ...basicDetails(account),\n                jwtToken: generateJwtToken(account)\n            });\n        }\n\n        function refreshToken() {\n            const refreshToken = getRefreshToken();\n            \n            if (!refreshToken) return unauthorized();\n\n            const account = accounts.find(x => x.refreshTokens.includes(refreshToken));\n            \n            if (!account) return unauthorized();\n\n            // replace old refresh token with a new one and save\n            account.refreshTokens = account.refreshTokens.filter((x: any) => x !== refreshToken);\n            account.refreshTokens.push(generateRefreshToken());\n            localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n\n            return ok({\n                ...basicDetails(account),\n                jwtToken: generateJwtToken(account)\n            });\n        }\n\n        function revokeToken() {\n            if (!isAuthenticated()) return unauthorized();\n            \n            const refreshToken = getRefreshToken();\n            const account = accounts.find(x => x.refreshTokens.includes(refreshToken));\n            \n            // revoke token and save\n            account.refreshTokens = account.refreshTokens.filter((x: any) => x !== refreshToken);\n            localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n\n            return ok();\n        }\n\n        function register() {\n            const account = body;\n\n            if (accounts.find(x => x.email === account.email)) {\n                // display email already registered \"email\" in alert\n                setTimeout(() => {\n                    alertService.info(`\n                        <h4>Email Already Registered</h4>\n                        <p>Your email ${account.email} is already registered.</p>\n                        <p>If you don't know your password please visit the <a href=\"${location.origin}/account/forgot-password\">forgot password</a> page.</p>\n                        <div><strong>NOTE:</strong> The fake backend displayed this \"email\" so you can test without an api. A real backend would send a real email.</div>\n                    `, { autoClose: false });\n                }, 1000);\n\n                // always return ok() response to prevent email enumeration\n                return ok();\n            }\n\n            // assign account id and a few other properties then save\n            account.id = newAccountId();\n            if (account.id === 1) {\n                // first registered account is an admin\n                account.role = Role.Admin;\n            } else {\n                account.role = Role.User;\n            }\n            account.dateCreated = new Date().toISOString();\n            account.verificationToken = new Date().getTime().toString();\n            account.isVerified = false;\n            account.refreshTokens = [];\n            delete account.confirmPassword;\n            accounts.push(account);\n            localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n\n            // display verification email in alert\n            setTimeout(() => {\n                const verifyUrl = `${location.origin}/account/verify-email?token=${account.verificationToken}`;\n                alertService.info(`\n                    <h4>Verification Email</h4>\n                    <p>Thanks for registering!</p>\n                    <p>Please click the below link to verify your email address:</p>\n                    <p><a href=\"${verifyUrl}\">${verifyUrl}</a></p>\n                    <div><strong>NOTE:</strong> The fake backend displayed this \"email\" so you can test without an api. A real backend would send a real email.</div>\n                `, { autoClose: false });\n            }, 1000);\n\n            return ok();\n        }\n        \n        function verifyEmail() {\n            const { token } = body;\n            const account = accounts.find(x => !!x.verificationToken && x.verificationToken === token);\n            \n            if (!account) return error('Verification failed');\n            \n            // set is verified flag to true if token is valid\n            account.isVerified = true;\n            localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n\n            return ok();\n        }\n\n        function forgotPassword() {\n            const { email } = body;\n            const account = accounts.find(x => x.email === email);\n            \n            // always return ok() response to prevent email enumeration\n            if (!account) return ok();\n            \n            // create reset token that expires after 24 hours\n            account.resetToken = new Date().getTime().toString();\n            account.resetTokenExpires = new Date(Date.now() + 24*60*60*1000).toISOString();\n            localStorage.setItem(accountsKey, JSON.stringify(accounts));\n\n            // display password reset email in alert\n            setTimeout(() => {\n                const resetUrl = `${location.origin}/account/reset-password?token=${account.resetToken}`;\n                alertService.info(`\n                    <h4>Reset Password Email</h4>\n                    <p>Please click the below link to reset your password, the link will be valid for 1 day:</p>\n                    <p><a href=\"${resetUrl}\">${resetUrl}</a></p>\n                    <div><strong>NOTE:</strong> The fake backend displayed this \"email\" so you can test without an api. A real backend would send a real email.</div>\n                `, { autoClose: false });\n            }, 1000);\n\n            return ok();\n        }\n        \n        function validateResetToken() this.loadingSubjects = false;\n        // If we have a subjectId from URL and subjects are loaded, set it\n        if (this.subjectId && subjects.length > 0) {\n          const subjectExists = subjects.some(s => s.subjectId === this.subjectId);\n          if (subjectExists) {\n            this.form.patchValue({\n              subjectId: this.subjectId\n            });\n s.subjectId === Number(selectedId));\n    return subject ? subject.subjectName : '';\n  }\n  onSubmit() {\n    this.submitted = true;\n    // stop here if form is invalid\n    if (this.form.invalid) points: formValue.points || 100\n    };\n    console.log('Final request data being sent:', requestData);\n    this.http.post(`${environment.apiUrl}/classroom/questions`, PC\\OneDrive\\Documents\\JAVA\\Extra\\offLineBoilerPlateAngular-main\\src\\app\\classroom\\create-question.component.html"],"sourcesContent":["import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';\r\nimport { Router, ActivatedRoute } from '@angular/router';\r\nimport { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms';\r\nimport { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';\r\nimport { first } from 'rxjs/operators';\r\nimport { environment } from '@environments/environment';\r\nimport { AlertService } from '@app/_services';\r\nimport { SubjectService } from '@app/_services/subject.service';\r\n\r\n@Component({\r\n  selector: 'app-create-question',\r\n  templateUrl: './create-question.component.html',\r\n  styleUrls: ['./create-question.component.css']\r\n})\r\nexport class CreateQuestionComponent implements OnInit {\r\n  form!: FormGroup;\r\n  subjects: any[] = [];\r\n  submitting = false;\r\n  submitted = false;\r\n  subjectId: number | null = null;\r\n  loadingSubjects = true;\r\n\r\n  constructor(\r\n    private formBuilder: FormBuilder,\r\n    private router: Router,\r\n    private route: ActivatedRoute,\r\n    private http: HttpClient,\r\n    private alertService: AlertService,\r\n    private subjectService: SubjectService\r\n  ) { }\r\n\r\n  ngOnInit() {\r\n    // Check if subjectId is passed in query params\r\n    this.route.queryParams.subscribe(params => {\r\n      this.subjectId = params['subjectId'] ? Number(params['subjectId']) : null;\r\n      console.log('SubjectId from URL:', this.subjectId); // Debug log\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    this.form = this.formBuilder.group({\r\n      subjectId: [this.subjectId || '', Validators.required],\r\n      questionText: ['', [\r\n        Validators.required,\r\n        Validators.minLength(10),\r\n        Validators.maxLength(500)\r\n      ]],\r\n      dueDate: [''],\r\n      points: [100]\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    this.loadSubjects();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  loadSubjects() {\r\n    this.loadingSubjects = true;\r\n    console.log('Loading subjects...'); // Debug log\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getMySubjects()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Loaded subjects:', subjects); // Debug log\r\n          this.subjects = subjects;\r\n          this.loadingSubjects = false;\r\n          \r\n          // If we have a subjectId from URL and subjects are loaded, set it\r\n          if (this.subjectId && subjects.length > 0) {\r\n            const subjectExists = subjects.some(s => s.subjectId === this.subjectId);\r\n            if (subjectExists) {\r\n              this.form.patchValue({ subjectId: this.subjectId });\r\n              console.log('Set subjectId from URL:', this.subjectId);\r\n            }\r\n          }\r\n          \r\n          if (subjects.length === 0) {\r\n            this.alertService.warn('You need to create a subject first before creating questions.');\r\n          }\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loadingSubjects = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // convenience getter for easy access to form fields\r\n  get f() { return this.form.controls; }\r\n\r\n  // Add this method to get the selected subject name for display\r\n  getSelectedSubjectName(): string {\r\n    const selectedId = this.form?.get('subjectId')?.value;\r\n    if (!selectedId) return '';\r\n    \r\n    const subject = this.subjects.find(s => s.subjectId === Number(selectedId));\r\n    return subject ? subject.subjectName : '';\r\n  }\r\n\r\nonSubmit() {\r\n  this.submitted = true;\r\n\r\n  // stop here if form is invalid\r\n  if (this.form.invalid) {\r\n    console.log('Form invalid:', this.form.errors);\r\n    console.log('Form values:', this.form.value);\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // Double-check subjectId is present\r\n  const formValue = this.form.value;\r\n  console.log('Raw form value:', formValue);\r\n  console.log('SubjectId value:', formValue.subjectId);\r\n  console.log('SubjectId type:', typeof formValue.subjectId);\r\n\r\n  if (!formValue.subjectId) {\r\n    console.error('SubjectId is missing from form');\r\n    this.alertService.error('Please select a subject');\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  this.submitting = true;\r\n  \r\n  // Make sure subjectId is a number\r\n  const requestData = {\r\n    questionText: formValue.questionText,\r\n    subjectId: Number(formValue.subjectId), // Force convert to number\r\n    dueDate: formValue.dueDate || null,\r\n    points: formValue.points || 100\r\n  };\r\n  \r\n  console.log('Final request data being sent:', requestData);\r\n  \r\n  this.http.post<any>(`${environment.apiUrl}/classroom/questions`, requestData)\r\n    .pipe(first())\r\n    .subscribe({\r\n      next: (response) => {\r\n        console.log('Question created successfully:', response);\r\n        this.alertService.success('Question created successfully', { keepAfterRouteChange: true });\r\n        \r\n        // Navigate back to subject\r\n        const selectedSubjectId = requestData.subjectId;\r\n        if (selectedSubjectId) {\r\n          this.router.navigate(['/classroom/subject', selectedSubjectId]);\r\n        } else {\r\n          this.router.navigate(['/classroom/subjects']);\r\n        }\r\n      },\r\n      error: (error: any) => {\r\n        console.error('Error creating question:', error);\r\n        \r\n        // Log the full error response\r\n        if (error.error) {\r\n          console.error('Error details from server:', error.error);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.alertService.error(error.message || error || 'Failed to create question');\r\n        this.submitting = false;\r\n      }\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n  goBack() {\r\n    if (this.subjectId) {\r\n      this.router.navigate(['/classroom/subject', this.subjectId]);\r\n    } else {\r\n      this.router.navigate(['/classroom/subjects']);\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n}","<div class=\"create-container\">\r\n  <!-- Header -->\r\n  <div class=\"d-flex align-items-center mb-4\">\r\n    <button class=\"back-link\" (click)=\"goBack()\">\r\n      <i class=\"bi bi-arrow-left me-2\"></i>\r\n      Back\r\n    </button>\r\n    <h1 class=\"display-6 fw-bold text-primary ms-3 mb-0\">\r\n      <i class=\"bi bi-plus-circle me-2\"></i>Create Question\r\n    </h1>\r\n  </div>\r\n\r\n  <div class=\"row justify-content-center\">\r\n    <div class=\"col-lg-8\">\r\n      <div class=\"create-card\">\r\n        <!-- Loading State -->\r\n        <div *ngIf=\"loadingSubjects\" class=\"text-center py-4\">\r\n          <div class=\"spinner-border text-primary\" role=\"status\">\r\n            <span class=\"visually-hidden\">Loading subjects...</span>\r\n          </div>\r\n          <p class=\"mt-3 text-secondary\">Loading your subjects...</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        <!-- No Subjects Warning -->\r\n        <div *ngIf=\"!loadingSubjects && subjects.length === 0\" class=\"alert alert-warning\">\r\n          <i class=\"bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill me-2\"></i>\r\n          You don't have any subjects yet. \r\n          <a routerLink=\"/classroom/subjects\" class=\"alert-link\">Create a subject first</a> before creating questions.\r\n        </div>\r\n\r\n        <!-- Create Question Form -->\r\n        <form *ngIf=\"!loadingSubjects && subjects.length > 0\" [formGroup]=\"form\" (ngSubmit)=\"onSubmit()\">\r\n          <!-- Subject Selection -->\r\n          <div class=\"mb-4\">\r\n            <label class=\"form-label\">\r\n              <i class=\"bi bi-book text-primary me-2\"></i>\r\n              Subject <span class=\"text-danger\">*</span>\r\n            </label>\r\n            <select class=\"form-select\" formControlName=\"subjectId\"\r\n                    [ngClass]=\"{ 'is-invalid': submitted && f.subjectId.errors }\">\r\n              <option value=\"\">-- Select a subject --</option>\r\n              <option *ngFor=\"let subject of *ngIf=\"submitted && f.subjectId.errors\" class=\"invalid-feedback\">\r\n              Please select a subject\r\n            </div>\r\n            <div *ngIf=\"subjectId && subjects.length > 0\" [\"./answer.component.css\"],\r\n})\r\nexport class AnswerComponent implements OnInit {\r\n  form!: FormGroup;\r\n  questionId!: string;\r\n  question: any = null;\r\n  feedback: any = null;\r\n  submitting = false;\r\n  submitted = false;\r\n\r\n  constructor(\r\n    private route: ActivatedRoute,\r\n    private router: Router,\r\n    private fb: FormBuilder,\r\n    private http: HttpClient,\r\n  ) {}\r\n\r\n  ngOnInit() {\r\n    this.questionId = this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get(\"id\")!;\r\n\r\n    this.form = this.fb.group({\r\n      answerText: [\r\n        \"\",\r\n        [\r\n          Validators.required,\r\n          Validators.minLength(10),\r\n          Validators.maxLength(500),\r\n        ],\r\n      ],\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    this.loadQuestion();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  loadQuestion() {\r\n    // First try to get from state\r\n    const state = history.state;\r\n    if (state && state.question) {\r\n      this.question = state.question;\r\n    } else {\r\n      // If not in state, fetch from API\r\n      this.http\r\n        .get<any>(\r\n          `${environment.apiUrl}/classroom/questions/${this.questionId}`,\r\n        )\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (data) => {\r\n            this.question = data;\r\n            // Format teacher name if not already formatted\r\n            if (data.teacher) {\r\n              this.question.teacherName = `${data.teacher.firstName} ${data.teacher.lastName}`;\r\n            }\r\n          },\r\n          error: (err) => {\r\n            console.error(\"Error loading question:\", err);\r\n          },\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  // convenience getter for easy access to form fields\r\n  get f() {\r\n    return this.form.controls;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  submit() {\r\n    this.submitted = true;\r\n\r\n    if (this.form.invalid) {\r\n      // Scroll to error\r\n      document.querySelector(\".is-invalid\")?.scrollIntoView({\r\n        behavior: \"smooth\",\r\n        block: \"center\",\r\n      });\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    this.submitting = true;\r\n    this.feedback = null;\r\n\r\n    this.http\r\n      .post<any>(\r\n        `${environment.apiUrl}/classroom/questions/${this.questionId}/answer`,\r\n        this.form.value,\r\n      )\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (res) => {\r\n          this.feedback = res;\r\n          this.submitting = false;\r\n          // Scroll to feedback\r\n          setTimeout(() => {\r\n            document.querySelector(\".feedback-section\")?.scrollIntoView({\r\n              behavior: \"smooth\",\r\n              block: \"center\",\r\n            });\r\n          }, 100);\r\n        },\r\n        error: (err) => {\r\n          console.error(\"Error submitting answer:\", any;\r\n\r\n@Component({\r\n  selector: 'app-subjects',\r\n  templateUrl: './subjects.component.html',\r\n  styleUrls: ['./subjects.component.css']\r\n})\r\nexport class SubjectsComponent implements OnInit, AfterViewInit {\r\n  subjects: any[] = [];\r\n  filteredSubjects: any[] = [];\r\n  loading = true;\r\n  account: Account | null;\r\n  viewMode: 'enrolled' | 'available' = 'enrolled'; // Default to enrolled\r\n  \r\n  // Modal\r\n  modal: any;\r\n  modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n  subjectForm!: FormGroup;\r\n  submitting = false;\r\n  submitted = false;\r\n  editingSubject: any = null;\r\n\r\nconstructor(\r\n  private subjectService: SubjectService,\r\n  private accountService: AccountService,\r\n  private alertService: AlertService,\r\n  private formBuilder: FormBuilder,\r\n  private router: Router\r\n) {\r\n  this.account = this.accountService.accountValue;\r\n  \r\n  // Debug the service\r\n  console.log('SubjectService constructor check:', {\r\n    service: this.subjectService,\r\n    getAllType: typeof this.subjectService?.getAll,\r\n    getAllExists: !!this.subjectService?.getAll,\r\n    getMySubjectsExists: !!this.subjectService?.getMySubjects\r\n  });\r\n  \r\n  // If getAll is missing, try to reassign from window (temporary fix)\r\n  if (this.subjectService && typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n    console.warn('getAll method missing, attempting to fix...');\r\n    // This is a hack - in a real app, we'd need to find the root cause\r\n    setTimeout(() => {\r\n      console.log('Delayed service check:', {\r\n        service: this.subjectService,\r\n        getAll: this.subjectService?.getAll\r\n      });\r\n    }, 1000);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Add to constructor or ngOnInit\r\nngOnInit() {\r\n  console.log('Current logged-in user:', this.account);\r\n  console.log('User AccountId:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n  console.log('User Role:', this.account?.role);\r\n  \r\n  this.initForm();\r\n  this.loadSubjects();\r\n}\r\n\r\n  ngAfterViewInit() {\r\n    this.initializeModal();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initializeModal() {\r\n    const modalElement = document.getElementById('subjectModal');\r\n    if (modalElement) {\r\n      this.modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement, {\r\n        backdrop: 'static',\r\n        keyboard: false\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initForm() {\r\n    this.subjectForm = this.formBuilder.group({\r\n      subjectName: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      subjectCode: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      description: [''],\r\n      schedule: [''],\r\n      room: ['']\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  get f() { return this.subjectForm.controls; }\r\n\r\nloadSubjects() {\r\n  this.loading = true;\r\n  \r\n  // Add defensive check\r\n  if (!this.subjectService) {\r\n    console.error('SubjectService is not initialized');\r\n    this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n    this.loading = false;\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  \r\n  if (this.isTeacher()) {\r\n    // Teachers see all subjects they teach\r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getMySubjects !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getMySubjects is not a function');\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service method error');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getMySubjects()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Loaded subjects for teacher:', subjects);\r\n          this.subjects = subjects;\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  } else {\r\n    // Students see all subjects with enrollment status\r\n    console.log('Loading subjects for student with ID:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n    \r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getAll is not a function on subjectService', this.subjectService);\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getAll()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Raw subjects from API:', subjects);\r\n          \r\n          // Add isEnrolled flag if not present\r\n          this.subjects = subjects.map(subject => ({\r\n            ...subject,\r\n            isEnrolled: subject.isEnrolled || false\r\n          }));\r\n          \r\n          console.log('Processed subjects:', this.subjects);\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n          \r\n          // Log enrollment status for debugging\r\n          const enrolledCount = this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n          console.log(`Student is enrolled in ${enrolledCount} subjects`);\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n  filterSubjects() {\r\n    if (this.isStudent()) {\r\n      if (this.viewMode === 'enrolled') {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => s.isEnrolled === true);\r\n        console.log('Enrolled subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => !s.isEnrolled);\r\n        console.log('Available subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      }\r\n    } else {\r\n      this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  setViewMode(mode: 'enrolled' | 'available') {\r\n    this.viewMode = mode;\r\n    this.filterSubjects();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isTeacher(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Teacher' || this.account?.role === 'Admin';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isStudent(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Student' || this.account?.role === 'User';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  openCreateSubjectModal() {\r\n    console.log('Opening create subject modal');\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = null;\r\n    this.subjectForm.reset();\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (!this.modal) {\r\n      this.initializeModal();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  editSubject(subject: any) {\r\n    console.log('Editing subject:', subject);\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Edit Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = subject;\r\n    this.subjectForm.patchValue({\r\n      subjectName: subject.subjectName,\r\n      subjectCode: subject.subjectCode,\r\n      description: subject.description || '',\r\n      schedule: subject.schedule || '',\r\n      room: subject.room || ''\r\n    });\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  saveSubject() {\r\n    this.submitted = true;\r\n\r\n    if (this.subjectForm.invalid) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    this.submitting = true;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.editingSubject) {\r\n {"ast":null,"code":"import { isFunction } from './util/isFunction';\nimport { isSubscription, Subscription } from './Subscription';\nimport { config } from './config';\nimport { reportUnhandledError }    this.isStopped = false;\n    if (destination) {\n      this.destination = destination;\n      if (isSubscription(destination)) {\n        destination.add(this);\n      }\n    } else {\n      this.destination = EMPTY_OBSERVER;\n    }\n  }\n  static create(next, error, complete) {\n    return new SafeSubscriber(next, error, complete);\n  }\n  next(value) {\n    if (this.isStopped) {\n      handleStoppedNotification(nextNotification(value), this);\n    } else {\n      this._next(value);\n    }\n  }\n  error(err) {\n    if (this.isStopped) {\n      handleStoppedNotification(errorNotification(err), this);\n    } else {\n      this.isStopped = true;\n      this._error(err);\n    }\n  }\n  complete() {\n    if (this.isStopped) {\n      handleStoppedNotification(COMPLETE_NOTIFICATION, this);\n    } else {\n      this.isStopped = true;\n      this._complete();\n    }\n  }\n  unsubscribe() {\n    if (!this.closed) {\n      this.isStopped = true;\n      super.unsubscribe();\n      this.destination = null;\n    }\n  }\n  _next(value) {\n    this.destination.next(value);\n  }\n  _error(err) {\n    try {\n      this.destination.error(err);\n    } finally {\n      this.unsubscribe();\n    }\n  }\n  _complete() {\n    try {\n      this.destination.complete();\n    } finally {\n      this.unsubscribe();\n    }\n  }\n}\nconst _bind = Function.prototype.bind;\nfunction bind(fn, thisArg) {\n  return _bind.call(fn, thisArg);\n}\nclass ConsumerObserver {\n  constructor(partialObserver) {\n    this.partialObserver = partialObserver;\n  }\n  next(value) {\n    const {\n      partialObserver\n    } = this;\n    if (partialObserver.next) {\n      try {\n        partialObserver.next(value);\n      } catch (error) {\n        handleUnhandledError(error);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  error(err) {\n    const {\n      partialObserver\n    } = this;\n    if (partialObserver.error) {\n      try {\n partialObserver\n    } = this;\n    if (partialObserver.complete) {\n      try {\n        partialObserver.complete();\n      } catch (error) {\n        handleUnhandledError(error);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\nexport class SafeSubscriber extends Subscriber {\n  constructor(observerOrNext, error, complete) {\n    super();\n    let partialObserver;\n    if (isFunction(observerOrNext) || !observerOrNext) {\n      partialObserver = {\n        next: observerOrNext !== null && observerOrNext !== void 0 ? observerOrNext : undefined,\n        error: error !== null && error !== void 0 ? error : undefined,\n        complete: complete !== null && complete !== void 0 ? complete : undefined\n      };\n    } else {\n      let context;\n      if (this && config.useDeprecatedNextContext) {\n        context = Object.create(observerOrNext);\n        context.unsubscribe = () => this.unsubscribe();\n        partialObserver = {\n          next: observerOrNext.next && bind(observerOrNext.next, context),\n          error: observerOrNext.error && bind(observerOrNext.error, context),\n          complete: observerOrNext.complete && bind(observerOrNext.complete, context)\n        };\n      } else {\n        partialObserver = observerOrNext;\n      }\n    }\n    this.destination = new ConsumerObserver(partialObserver);\n  }\n}\nfunction handleUnhandledError(error) {\n  if \"@angular/core\";\nimport * as i1 from \"@angular/router\";\nimport * as i2 from \"@angular/common/http\";\nconst baseUrl = `${environment.apiUrl}/accounts`;\nexport class AccountService {\n   private accountSubject: BehaviorSubject<Account | null>;\n    public account: Observable<Account | null>;\n\n    constructor(\n        private router: Router,\n        private http: HttpClient\n    ) {\n        this.accountSubject = new BehaviorSubject<Account | null>(null);\n        this.account = this.accountSubject.asObservable();\n    }\n\n    public get accountValue() {\n        return this.accountSubject.value;\n    }\n\n    login(email: string, password: string) {\n        return this.http.post<any>(`${baseUrl}/authenticate`, { email, password }, { withCredentials: true })\n            .pipe(map(account => {\n                this.accountSubject.next(account);\n                this.startRefreshTokenTimer();\n                return account;\n            }));\n    }\n\n    logout() {\n        this.http.post<any>(`${baseUrl}/revoke-token`, {}, { withCredentials: true }).subscribe();\n        this.stopRefreshTokenTimer();\n        this.accountSubject.next(null);\n        this.router.navigate(['/account/login']);\n    }\n\n    refreshToken() {\n        return this.http.post<any>(`${baseUrl}/refresh-token`, {}, { withCredentials: true })\n            .pipe(map((account) => {\n                this.accountSubject.next(account);\n                this.startRefreshTokenTimer();\n                return account;\n            }));\n    }\n\n    register(account: Account) {\n        return this.http.post(`${baseUrl}/register`, account);\n    }\n\n    verifyEmail(token: string) {\n        return this.http.post(`${baseUrl}/verify-email`, { token });\n    }\n\n               this.accountSubject.next(account);\n                }\n                return account;\n            }));\n    }\n\n    delete(AccountId: string) {\n        return this.http.delete(`${baseUrl}/${AccountId}`)\n            .pipe(finalize(() => {\n                // auto logout if the logged in account was deleted\n                if (AccountId === this.accountValue?.AccountId)\n                    this.logout();\n            }));\n    }\n\n    // helper methods\n\n    private refreshTokenTimeout?: any;\n\n    private startRefreshTokenTimer() {\n        // parse json object from base64 encoded jwt token\n        const jwtBase64 = this.accountValue!.jwtToken!.split('.')[1];\n        const jwtToken = JSON.parse(atob(jwtBase64));\n\n        // set a timeout to refresh the token a minute before it expires\n        const expires = new Date(jwtToken.exp * 1000);\n        const timeout = expires.getTime() - Date.now() - (60 * 1000);\n        this.refreshTokenTimeout = setTimeout(() => this.refreshToken().subscribe(), timeout);\n    }\n\n    private stopRefreshTokenTimer() {\n        clearTimeout(this.refreshTokenTimeout);\n      if (this.form.invalid) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.submitting = true;\n        this.accountService.update(this.account.AccountId!, this.form.value)\n            .pipe(first())\n            .subscribe({\n                next: () => {\n                    this.alertService.success('Update successful', { keepAfterRouteChange: true });\n this.submitting = false;\n                }\n            });\n    }\n\n    onDelete() {\n        if (confirm('Are you sure?')) {\n            this.deleting = true;\n            this.accountService.delete(this.account.AccountId!)\n                .pipe(first())\n                .subscribe(() => {\n                    this.alertService.success('Account deleted successfully', { subscribeForRetryWhen() : syncResub = true));\n        }\n        if (errors$) {\n          errors$.next(err);\n        }\n      }));\n      if (syncResub) {\n        innerSub.unsubscribe();\n        innerSub = null;\n        syncResub = false;\n        subscribeForRetryWhen();\n      }\n    };\n    subscribeForRetryWhen();\n  });\n}","map":{"version":3,"names":["Subject","operate","createOperatorSubscriber","retryWhen","notifier","source","subscriber","innerSub","syncResub","errors$","subscribeForRetryWhen","subscribe","undefined","err","next","unsubscribe"],"sources":["C:/Users/MY PC/OneDrive/Documents/JAVA/Extra/offLineBoilerPlateAngular-main/node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm/internal/operators/retryWhen.js"],"sourcesContent":["import { Subject } from '../Subject';\nimport { operate } from '../util/lift';\nimport { createOperatorSubscriber } from './OperatorSubscriber';\nexport function retryWhen(notifier) {\n    return operate((source, subscriber) => {\n        let innerSub;\n        let syncResub = false;\n        let errors$;\n        const subscribeForRetryWhen = () => {\n            innerSub = source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, undefined, undefined, (err) => {\n                if (!errors$) {\n                    errors$ = new Subject();\n                    notifier(errors$).subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, () => innerSub ? HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http';\r\nimport { Router } from '@angular/router';\r\nimport { environment } from '@environments/environment';\r\nimport { AccountService, AlertService, SubjectService } from '@app/_services'; // Import from _services\r\nimport { Account } from '@app/_models';\r\nimport { first } from 'rxjs/operators';\r\n\r\n@Component({\r\n  selector: 'app-list', // Add selector\r\n  templateUrl: './list.component.html',\r\n  styleUrls: ['./list.component.css']\r\n})\r\nexport class ListComponent implements OnInit {\r\n  questions: any[] = [];\r\n  filteredQuestions: any[] = [];\r\n  subjects: any[] = [];\r\n  loading = true;\r\n  account: Account | null;\r\n  selectedSubjectId: string = 'all';\r\n\r\n  constructor(\r\n    private http: HttpClient,\r\n    private router: Router,\r\n    private accountService: AccountService,\r\n    private subjectService: SubjectService,\r\n    private alertService: AlertService\r\n  ) {\r\n    this.account = this.accountService.accountValue;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  ngOnInit() {\r\n    this.loadSubjects();\r\n    this.loadQuestions();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  loadSubjects() {\r\n    this.subjectService.getAll()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          this.subjects = subjects;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  loadQuestions() {\r\n    this.loading = true;\r\n    this.http.get<any[]>(`${environment.apiUrl}/classroom/questions`)\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (data: any[]) => {\r\n          this.questions = data;\r\n          this.applyFilter();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (err: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading questions:', err);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load questions');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  filterBySubject(event: any) {\r\n    this.selectedSubjectId = event.target.value;\r\n    this.applyFilter();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  applyFilter() {\r\n    if (this.selectedSubjectId === 'all') {\r\n      this.filteredQuestions = this.questions;\r\n    } else {\r\n      this.filteredQuestions = this.questions.filter(q => \r\n        q.subjectId == this.selectedSubjectId\r\n      );\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  hasUserAnswered(question: any): boolean {\r\n    return question.hasAnswered || false;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isTeacher(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Teacher' || this.account?.role === 'Admin';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isStudent(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Student' || this.account?.role === 'User';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  navigateToQuestion(question: any) {\r\n    if (this.isStudent() && question.hasAnswered) {\r\n      this.alertService.info('You have already answered this question');\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.router.navigate(['/classroom', question.questionId], {\r\n      state: { question: question }\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  viewAnswers(question: any) {\r\n    this.router.navigate(['/classroom/view', question.questionId], {\r\n      state: { question: question }\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  refreshQuestions() {\r\n    this.loadQuestions();\r\n  }\r\n}","<div class=\"classroom-container\">\r\n  <!-- Header Section -->\r\n  <div class=\"d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4\">\r\n    <div>\r\n      <h1 class=\"display-6 fw-bold text-primary mb-2\">\r\n        <i class=\"bi bi-question-circle-fill me-2\"></i>All Questions\r\n      </h1>\r\n      <p class=\"text-secondary\">\r\n        Browse all questions from all subjects\r\n      </p>\r\n    </div>\r\n    <div class=\"d-flex gap-2\">\r\n      <a routerLink=\"/classroom/subjects\" class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\">\r\n        <i class=\"bi bi-arrow-left me-2\"></i>Back to Subjects\r\n      </a>\r\n      <button class=\"btn btn-outline-secondary\" (click)=\"refreshQuestions()\" [disabled]=\"loading\">\r\n        <i class=\"bi bi-arrow-clockwise me-1\"></i>Refresh\r\n      </button>\r\n    </div>\r\n  </div>\r\n\r\n  <!-- Subject Filter -->\r\n  <div class=\"mb-4\">\r\n    <select class=\"form-select\" style=\"width: auto; [value]=\"subject.subjectId\">\r\n        {{ subject.subjectName }} ({{ subject.subjectCode }})\r\n      </option>\r\n    </select>\r\n  </div>\r\n\r\n  <!-- Loading State -->\r\n  <div *ngIf=\"loading\" class=\"text-center py-5\">\r\n    <div class=\"spinner-border text-primary\" style=\"width: 3rem; height: 3rem;\" role=\"status\">\r\n      <span class=\"visually-hidden\">Loading...</span>\r\n    </div>\r\n    <p class=\"mt-3 text-secondary\">Loading questions...</p>\r\n  </div>\r\n\r\n  <!-- Questions Grid -->\r\n  <div *ngIf=\"!loading && filteredQuestions.length > 0\" class=\"row g-4\">\r\n    <div *ngFor=\"let q of filteredQuestions\" class=\"col-md-6 col-lg-4\">\r\n      <div class=\"card h-100\" [ngClass]=\"{'answered-card': isStudent() && q.hasAnswered}\">\r\n        <div class=\"card-body\">\r\n          <!-- Question Header -->\r\n          <div class=\"d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start mb-3\">\r\n            <span class=\"badge bg-primary bg-opacity-10 text-primary px-3 py-2 rounded-pill\">\r\n              <i class=\"bi bi-question-circle-fill me-1\"></i>Question\r\n            </span>\r\n            <div class=\"d-flex align-items-center gap-2\">\r\n              <span *ngIf=\"isStudent() && q.hasAnswered\" class=\"badge bg-success px-3 py-2 rounded-pill\">\r\n                <i class=\"bi bi-check-circle-fill me-1\"></i>Answered\r\n              </span>\r\n              <small class=\"text-secondary\">\r\n                <i class=\"bi bi-clock me-1\"></i>{{ q.createdAt | date:'short' }}\r\n              </small>\r\n            </div>\r\n          </div>\r\n\r\n          <!-- Subject Info -->\r\n          <div class=\"mb-2\">\r\n            <span class=\"badge bg-info bg-opacity-10 </div>\r\n\r\n          <!-- Question Content -->\r\n          <div class=\"question-content mb-3\">\r\n            <p class=\"card-text\">{{ q.questionText }}</p>\r\n          </div>\r\n\r\n          <!-- Teacher Info -->\r\n          <div class=\"d-flex align-items-center mb-3\">\r\n            <i class=\"bi bi-person-circle text-primary me-2\"></i>\r\n            <span class=\"text-secondary small\">\r\n              By: <strong>{{ q.teacherName || 'Teacher' }}</strong>\r\n            </span>\r\n          </div>\r\n\r\n          <!-- Action Button -->\r\n          <div class=\"d-grid\">\r\n            <ng-container *ngIf=\"isStudent()\">\r\n              <button (click)=\"navigateToQuestion(q)\" \r\n                      [disabled]=\"q.hasAnswered\"\r\n                      class=\"btn btn-lg\"\r\n                      [ngClass]=\"{\r\n                        'btn-outline-primary': !q.hasAnswered,\r\n                        'btn-success': q.hasAnswered\r\n   this.subjects = subjects;\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  } else {\r\n    // Students see all subjects with enrollment status\r\n    console.log('Loading subjects for student with ID:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n    \r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getAll is not a function on subjectService', this.subjectService);\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getAll()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Raw subjects from API:', subjects);\r\n          \r\n          // Add isEnrolled flag if not present\r\n          this.subjects = subjects.map(subject => ({\r\n            ...subject,\r\n            isEnrolled: subject.isEnrolled || false\r\n          }));\r\n          \r\n          console.log('Processed subjects:', this.subjects);\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n          \r\n          // Log enrollment status for debugging\r\n          const enrolledCount = this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n          console.log(`Student is enrolled in ${enrolledCount} subjects`);\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n  filterSubjects() {\r\n    if (this.isStudent()) {\r\n      if (this.viewMode === 'enrolled') {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => s.isEnrolled === true);\r\n        console.log('Enrolled subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => !s.isEnrolled);\r\n        console.log('Available subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      }\r\n    } else {\r\n      this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  setViewMode(mode: 'enrolled' | 'available') {\r\n    this.viewMode = mode;\r\n    this.filterSubjects();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isTeacher(): === 'User';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  openCreateSubjectModal() {\r\n    console.log('Opening create subject modal');\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = null;\r\n }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  editSubject(subject: any) {\r\n    console.log('Editing subject:', subject);\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Edit Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = subject;\r\n || '',\r\n      room: subject.room || ''\r\n    });\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  saveSubject() {\r\n    this.submitted = true;\r\n\r\n    if (this.subjectForm.invalid) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    this.submitting = true;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.editingSubject) {\r\n      this.subjectService.update(this.editingSubject.subjectId, this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n this.subjectService.create(this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n            console.log('Subject created:', response);\r\n            this.alertService.success('Subject created successfully');\r\n            this.modal.hide();\r\n            this.loadSubjects();\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n this.loadStudents();\n    }\n  }\n  loadSubject() {\n    this.loading = true;\n    this.subjectService.getById(this.subjectId).pipe(first()).subscribe({\n      next: subject => {\n        this.subject = subject;\n        this.loading = false;\n      },\n      error: error => {\n        this.alertService.error(error);\n        this.loading = false;\n      }\n    });\n  }\n  loadQuestions() {\n
