'@angular/core';\r\nimport { ActivatedRoute, Router } from '@angular/router';\r\nimport { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms';\r\nimport { first } from 'rxjs/operators';\r\nimport { SubjectService } from '@app/_services/subject.service';\r\nimport { AccountService, AlertService } from '@app/_services';\r\nimport { Account } from '@app/_models';\r\n\r\n@Component({\r\n  templateUrl: './subject-view.component.html',\r\n  styleUrls: ['./subject-view.component.css']\r\n})\r\nexport class SubjectViewComponent implements OnInit {\r\n  subjectId!: number;\r\n  subject: any = null;\r\n  questions: any[] = [];\r\n  students: any[] = [];\r\n  account: Account | null;\r\n  \r\n  activeTab: 'questions' | 'students' = 'questions';\r\n  \r\n  loading = true;\r\n  loadingQuestions = true;\r\n  loadingStudents = true;\r\n\r\n  constructor(\r\n    private route: ActivatedRoute,\r\n    private router: Router,\r\n    private subjectService: SubjectService,\r\n    private accountService: AccountService,\r\n    private alertService: AlertService\r\n  ) {\r\n    this.account = this.accountService.accountValue;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  ngOnInit() {\r\n    this.subjectId = Number(this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id'));\r\n    \r\n    // Try to get from state\r\n    const state = history.state;\r\n    if (state && state.subject) {\r\n      this.subject = state.subject;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.loadSubject();\r\n    this.loadQuestions();\r\n    \r\n    if (this.isTeacher()) {\r\n      this.loadStudents();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  loadSubject() {\r\n    this.loading = true;\r\n    this.subjectService.getById(this.subjectId)\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subject: any) => {\r\n          this.subject = subject;\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          this.alertService.error(error);\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  loadQuestions() {\r\n    this.loadingQuestions = true;\r\n    this.subjectService.getSubjectQuestions(this.subjectId)\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (questions: any[]) => {\r\n          this.questions = questions;\r\n          this.loadingQuestions = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          this.alertService.error(error);\r\n          this.loadingQuestions = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  loadStudents() {\r\n    this.loadingStudents = true;\r\n    this.subjectService.getStudents(this.subjectId)\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (students: any[]) => {\r\n          this.students = students;\r\n          this.loadingStudents = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          this.alertService.error(error);\r\n          this.loadingStudents = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  setActiveTab(tab: 'questions' | 'students') {\r\n    this.activeTab = tab;\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isTeacher(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Teacher' || this.account?.role === 'Admin';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isStudent(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Student' || this.account?.role === 'User';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  goBack() {\r\n    this.router.navigate(['/classroom/subjects']);\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  answerQuestion(question: any) {\r\n    this.router.navigate(['/classroom', question.questionId], {\r\n      state: { question: question, subject: this.subject }\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  viewAnswers(question: any) {\r\n    this.router.navigate(['/classroom/view', question.questionId], {\r\n      state: { question: question, subject: {"ast":null,"code":"import { Observable } from '../Observable';\nimport { executeSchedule } from '../util/executeSchedule';\nexport function scheduleAsyncIterable(input, scheduler) {\n  if (!input) {\n    throw new Error('Iterable cannot be null');\n  }\n  return new Observable(subscriber => {\n    executeSchedule(subscriber, scheduler, () => {\n      const iterator = input[Symbol.asyncIterator]();\n      executeSchedule(subscriber, scheduler, () => {\n        iterator.next().then(result => {\n          if (result.done) {\n            subscriber.complete();\n          } else {\n            subscriber.next(result.value);\n          }\n        });\n      }, 0, true);\n    });\n  });\n}","map":{"version":3,"names":["Observable","executeSchedule","scheduleAsyncIterable","input","scheduler","Error","subscriber","iterator","Symbol","asyncIterator","next","then","result","done","complete","value"],"sources":["C:/Users/MY OnInit, AfterViewInit {\r\n  subjects: any[] = [];\r\n  filteredSubjects: any[] = [];\r\n  loading = true;\r\n  account: Account | null;\r\n  viewMode: 'enrolled' | 'available' = 'enrolled'; // Default to enrolled\r\n  \r\n  // Modal\r\n  modal: any;\r\n  modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n  subjectForm!: FormGroup;\r\n  submitting = false;\r\n  submitted = false;\r\n  editingSubject: any = private router: Router\r\n) {\r\n  this.account = this.accountService.accountValue;\r\n  \r\n  // Debug the service\r\n  console.log('SubjectService constructor check:', {\r\n    service: this.subjectService,\r\n    getAllType: typeof this.subjectService?.getAll,\r\n    getAllExists: !!this.subjectService?.getAll,\r\n    getMySubjectsExists: !!this.subjectService?.getMySubjects\r\n  });\r\n  \r\n  // If getAll is missing, try to reassign from window (temporary fix)\r\n  if (this.subjectService && typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n    console.warn('getAll service: this.subjectService,\r\n        getAll: this.subjectService?.getAll\r\n      });\r\n    }, 1000);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Add to constructor or ngOnInit\r\nngOnInit() {\r\n this.loadSubjects();\r\n}\r\n\r\n  ngAfterViewInit() {\r\n    this.initializeModal();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initializeModal() {\r\n    const modalElement = document.getElementById('subjectModal');\r\n    if (modalElement) {\r\n      this.modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement, {\r\n        backdrop: 'static',\r\n        keyboard: false\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initForm() {\r\n    this.subjectForm = this.formBuilder.group({\r\n      subjectName: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      subjectCode: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      description: [''],\r\n      schedule: [''],\r\n      room: ['']\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  get f() { return this.subjectForm.controls; }\r\n\r\nloadSubjects() {\r\n  this.loading = true;\r\n  \r\n  // Add defensive check\r\n  if (!this.subjectService) {\r\n    console.error('SubjectService is not initialized');\r\n    this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n    this.loading = false;\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  \r\n  if (this.isTeacher()) {\r\n    // Teachers see all subjects they teach\r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getMySubjects !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getMySubjects is not a function');\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service method error');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getMySubjects()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Loaded subjects for teacher:', subjects);\r\n          this.subjects = subjects;\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  } else {\r\n    // Students see all subjects with enrollment status\r\n    console.log('Loading subjects for student with ID:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n    \r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getAll is not a function on subjectService', this.subjectService);\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getAll()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Raw subjects from API:', subjects);\r\n          \r\n          // Add isEnrolled flag if not present\r\n          this.subjects = subjects.map(subject => ({\r\n            ...subject,\r\n            isEnrolled: subject.isEnrolled || false\r\n          }));\r\n          \r\n          console.log('Processed subjects:', this.subjects);\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n          \r\n          // Log enrollment status for debugging\r\n          const enrolledCount = this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n          console.log(`Student is enrolled in ${enrolledCount} subjects`);\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n  filterSubjects() {\r\n    if (this.isStudent()) {\r\n      if (this.viewMode === 'enrolled') {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => s.isEnrolled === true);\r\n        console.log('Enrolled subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => !s.isEnrolled);\r\n        console.log('Available subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      }\r\n    } else {\r\n      this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  setViewMode(mode: 'enrolled' | 'available') {\r\n    this.viewMode = mode;\r\n    this.filterSubjects();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isTeacher(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Teacher' || this.account?.role === 'Admin';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isStudent(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Student' || this.account?.role === 'User';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  openCreateSubjectModal() {\r\n    console.log('Opening create subject modal');\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = null;\r\n    this.subjectForm.reset();\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (!this.modal) {\r\n      this.initializeModal();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  editSubject(subject: any) {\r\n    console.log('Editing subject:', subject);\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Edit Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = subject;\r\n    this.subjectForm.patchValue({\r\n      subjectName: subject.subjectName,\r\n      subjectCode: subject.subjectCode,\r\n      description: subject.description || '',\r\n      schedule: subject.schedule || '',\r\n      room: subject.room || ''\r\n    });\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  saveSubject() {\r\n    this.submitted = true;\r\n\r\n    if (this.subjectForm.invalid) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    this.submitting = true;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.editingSubject) {\r\n      this.subjectService.update(this.editingSubject.subjectId, this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n            console.log('Subject updated:', response);\r\n            this.alertService.success('Subject updated successfully');\r\n            this.modal.hide();\r\n            this.loadSubjects();\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          },\r\n          error: (error: any) => {\r\n            console.error('Error updating subject:', error);\r\n            this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to update subject');\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          }\r\n        });\r\n    } else {\r\n      console.log('Creating subject:', this.subjectForm.value);\r\n      this.subjectService.create(this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n            console.log('Subject created:', response);\r\n            this.alertService.success('Subject created successfully');\r\n            this.modal.hide();\r\n            this.loadSubjects();\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          },\r\n          error: (error: any) => {\r\n            console.error('Error creating subject:', error);\r\n            this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to create subject');\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          }\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\nenrollSubject(subject: any) {\r\n  if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to enroll in ${subject.subjectName}?`)) {\r\n    console.log('Enrolling in subject:', subject); // Add this log\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.enroll(subject.subjectId)\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (response) => {\r\n          console.log('Enroll response:', response); // Add this log\r\n          this.alertService.success(`Successfully enrolled in ${subject.subjectName}`);\r\n          \r\n          // Force reload from server\r\n          this.loadSubjects();\r\n          \r\n          // Switch to enrolled view\r\n          if (this.isStudent()) {\r\n            this.viewMode = 'enrolled';\r\n          }\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error enrolling:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to this.router.navigate(['/classroom/subject', subject.subjectId], {\r\n      state: { subject: subject }\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n}","<div class=\"subjects-container\">\r\n  <!-- Header -->\r\n  <div private router: Router\r\n) {\r\n  this.account = this.accountService.accountValue;\r\n  \r\n  // Debug the service\r\n  console.log('SubjectService constructor check:', {\r\n    service: });\r\n  \r\n  // If getAll is missing, try to reassign from window (temporary fix)\r\n  if (this.subjectService && typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n    console.warn('getAll console.log('Current logged-in user:', this.account);\r\n  console.log('User AccountId:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n  console.log('User Role:', this.account?.role);\r\n  \r\n  this.initForm();\r\n  this.loadSubjects();\r\n}\r\n\r\n  ngAfterViewInit() {\r\n    this.initializeModal();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initializeModal() {\r\n    const modalElement = document.getElementById('subjectModal');\r\n    if (modalElement) {\r\n      this.modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement, {\r\n        backdrop: 'static',\r\n        keyboard: false\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initForm() {\r\n    this.subjectForm = this.formBuilder.group({\r\n      subjectName: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      subjectCode: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      description: [''],\r\n      schedule: [''],\r\n      room: ['']\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  get f() { return this.subjectForm.controls; }\r\n\r\nloadSubjects() {\r\n  this.loading = true;\r\n  \r\n  // Add defensive check\r\n  if (!this.subjectService) {\r\n    console.error('SubjectService is not initialized');\r\n    this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n    this.loading = false;\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  \r\n  if (this.isTeacher()) {\r\n    // Teachers see all subjects they teach\r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getMySubjects !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getMySubjects is not a function');\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service method error');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getMySubjects()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Loaded subjects for teacher:', subjects);\r\n          this.subjects = subjects;\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  } else {\r\n    // Students see all subjects with enrollment status\r\n    console.log('Loading subjects for student with ID:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n    \r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getAll is not a function on subjectService', this.subjectService);\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getAll()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Raw subjects from API:', subjects);\r\n          \r\n          // Add isEnrolled flag if not present\r\n          this.subjects = subjects.map(subject => ({\r\n            ...subject,\r\n            isEnrolled: subject.isEnrolled || false\r\n          }));\r\n          \r\n          console.log('Processed subjects:', this.subjects);\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n          \r\n          // Log enrollment status for debugging\r\n          const enrolledCount = this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n          console.log(`Student is enrolled in ${enrolledCount} subjects`);\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n  filterSubjects() {\r\n    if (this.isStudent()) {\r\n      if (this.viewMode === 'enrolled') {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => s.isEnrolled === true);\r\n        console.log('Enrolled subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => !s.isEnrolled);\r\n        console.log('Available subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      }\r\n    } else {\r\n      this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  setViewMode(mode: 'enrolled' | 'available') {\r\n    this.viewMode = mode;\r\n    this.filterSubjects();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isTeacher(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Teacher' || this.account?.role === 'Admin';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isStudent(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Student' || this.account?.role === 'User';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  openCreateSubjectModal() {\r\n    console.log('Opening create subject modal');\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = null;\r\n    this.subjectForm.reset();\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (!this.modal) {\r\n      this.initializeModal();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  editSubject(subject: any) {\r\n    console.log('Editing subject:', subject);\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Edit Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = subject;\r\n    this.subjectForm.patchValue({\r\n      subjectName: subject.subjectName,\r\n      subjectCode: subject.subjectCode,\r\n      description: subject.description || '',\r\n      schedule: subject.schedule || '',\r\n      room: subject.room || ''\r\n    });\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  saveSubject() {\r\n    this.submitted = true;\r\n\r\n    if (this.subjectForm.invalid) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    this.submitting = true;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.editingSubject) {\r\n      this.subjectService.update(this.editingSubject.subjectId, this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n            console.log('Subject updated:', response);\r\n            this.alertService.success('Subject updated successfully');\r\n            this.modal.hide();\r\n            this.loadSubjects();\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          },\r\n          error: (error: any) => {\r\n            console.error('Error updating subject:', error);\r\n            this.alertService.error(error.message || this.initializeModal();\n  }\n  initializeModal() {\n    const modalElement = document.getElementById('subjectModal');\n    if (modalElement) {\n      this.modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement,   this.loading = true;\n    // Add defensive check\n    if (!this.subjectService) {\n      console.error('SubjectService is not initialized');\n      this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\n      this.loading = false;\n      return;\n    }\n    if (this.isTeacher()) {\n      // Teachers see all subjects they teach\n      if (typeof this.subjectService.getMySubjects !== 'function') {\n        console.error('getMySubjects is not a function');\n        this.alertService.error('Service method error');\n        this.loading = false;\n        return;\n      }\n      this.subjectService.getMySubjects().pipe(first()).subscribe({\n        next: subjects => {\n          console.log('Loaded subjects for teacher:', subjects);\n          this.subjects = subjects;\n          this.filterSubjects();\n          this.loading = false;\n        },\n        error: error => {\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\n          this.loading = false;\n        }\n      });\n    } else {\n      // Students see all subjects with enrollment status\n      console.log('Loading subjects for student with ID:', this.account?.AccountId);\n      if (typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\n        console.error('getAll is not a function on subjectService', this.subjectService);\n        this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\n        this.loading = false;\n        return;\n      }\n      this.subjectService.getAll().pipe(first()).subscribe({\n        next: subjects => {\n          console.log('Raw subjects from API:', subjects);\n          // Add isEnrolled flag if not present\n          this.subjects = subjects.map(subject => ({\n            ...subject,\n            isEnrolled: subject.isEnrolled || false\n          }));\n          console.log('Processed subjects:', this.subjects);\n          this.filterSubjects();\n          this.loading = false;\n          // Log enrollment status for debugging\n          const enrolledCount = this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled).length;\n          console.log(`Student is enrolled in ${enrolledCount} subjects`);\n        },\n        error: error => {\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\n          this.loading = false;\n        }\n      });\n    }\n  }\n  filterSubjects() {\n    if (this.isStudent()) {\n      if (this.viewMode === 'enrolled') {\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled === true);\n        console.log('Enrolled subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\n      } else {\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter(s => !s.isEnrolled);\n        console.log('Available subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\n      }\n    } else {\n      this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects;\n    }\n  }\n  setViewMode(mode) {\n    this.viewMode = mode;\n    this.filterSubjects();\n  }\n  isTeacher() {\n    return this.account?.role === 'Teacher' || this.account?.role === 'Admin';\n  }\n  isStudent() {\n    return this.account?.role === 'Student' || this.account?.role === 'User';\n  }\n  openCreateSubjectModal() {\n    console.log('Opening create this.initializeModal();\n    }\n    if (this.modal) {\n      this.modal.show();\n    }\n  }\n  editSubject(subject) {\n    console.log('Editing subject:', subject);\n    this.modalTitle = 'Edit Subject';\n    this.editingSubject = subject;\n    this.subjectForm.patchValue({\n      subjectName: subject.subjectName,\n      subjectCode: subject.subjectCode,\n      description: subject.description || '',\n      schedule: subject.schedule || '',\n      room: subject.room || ''\n    });\n    this.submitted = false;\n    if (this.modal) {\n      this.modal.show();\n    }\n  }\n  saveSubject() {\n    this.submitted = true;\n    if (this.subjectForm.invalid) {\n      return;\n    }\n    this.submitting = true;\n    if (this.editingSubject) {\n      this.subjectService.update(this.editingSubject.subjectId, this.subjectForm.value).pipe(first()).subscribe({\n        next: response => {\n          console.log('Subject updated:', response);\n          this.alertService.success('Subject updated successfully');\n          this.modal.hide();\n          this.loadSubjects();\n          this.submitting = false;\n        },\n        error: error => {\n          console.error('Error updating subject:', error);\n          this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to update subject');\n          this.submitting = false;\n        }\n      });\n    } else {\n      console.log('Creating subject:', this.subjectForm.value);\n      this.subjectService.create(this.subjectForm.value).pipe(first()).subscribe({\n        next: response => {\n          console.log('Subject created:', response);\n          this.alertService.success('Subject created successfully');\n          this.modal.hide();\n          this.loadSubjects();\n          this.submitting = false;\n        },\n        error: error => {\n          console.error('Error creating subject:', error);\n          this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to create subject');\n          this.submitting = false;\n        }\n      });\n    }\n  }\n  enrollSubject(subject) {\n    if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to enroll in ${subject.subjectName}?`)) {\n      console.log('Enrolling in subject:', subject); // Add this log\n      this.subjectService.enroll(subject.subjectId).pipe(first()).subscribe({\n        next: response => {\n          console.log('Enroll response:', response); // Add this log\n          this.alertService.success(`Successfully enrolled in ${subject.subjectName}`);\n          // Force reload from server\n          this.loadSubjects();\n          // Switch to enrolled view\n          if (this.isStudent()) {\n            this.viewMode = 'enrolled';\n          }\n        },\n        error: error => {\n          console.error('Error enrolling:', error);\n          this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to enroll');\n        }\n      });\n    }\n  }\n  // Add these helper methods\n  getEnrolledCount() {\n    return this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled).length;\n  }\n  getAvailableCount() {\n    return this.subjects.filter(s => !s.isEnrolled).length;\n  }\n  viewSubject(subject) {\n    this.router.navigate(['/classroom/subject', subject.subjectId], {\n      state: {\n        subject: subject\n      }\n    });\n  }\n}\nSubjectsComponent.ɵfac = function private router: Router\r\n) {\r\n  this.account = this.accountService.accountValue;\r\n  \r\n  // Debug the service\r\n  console.log('SubjectService constructor check:', {\r\n    service: });\r\n  \r\n  // If getAll is missing, try to reassign from window (temporary fix)\r\n  if (this.subjectService && typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n    console.warn('getAll console.log('Current logged-in user:', this.account);\r\n  console.log('User AccountId:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n  console.log('User Role:', this.account?.role);\r\n  \r\n  this.initForm();\r\n  this.loadSubjects();\r\n}\r\n\r\n  ngAfterViewInit() {\r\n    this.initializeModal();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initializeModal() {\r\n    const modalElement = document.getElementById('subjectModal');\r\n    if (modalElement) {\r\n      this.modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement, {\r\n        backdrop: 'static',\r\n        keyboard: false\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initForm() {\r\n    this.subjectForm = this.formBuilder.group({\r\n      subjectName: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      subjectCode: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      description: [''],\r\n      schedule: [''],\r\n      room: ['']\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  get f() { return this.subjectForm.controls; }\r\n\r\nloadSubjects() {\r\n  this.loading = true;\r\n  \r\n  // Add defensive check\r\n  if (!this.subjectService) {\r\n    console.error('SubjectService is not initialized');\r\n    this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n    this.loading = false;\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  \r\n  if (this.isTeacher()) {\r\n    // Teachers see all subjects they teach\r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getMySubjects !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getMySubjects is not a function');\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service method error');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getMySubjects()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Loaded subjects for teacher:', subjects);\r\n          this.subjects = subjects;\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  } else {\r\n    // Students see all subjects with enrollment status\r\n    console.log('Loading subjects for student with ID:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n    \r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getAll is not a function on subjectService', this.subjectService);\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getAll()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Raw subjects from API:', subjects);\r\n          \r\n          // Add isEnrolled flag if not present\r\n          this.subjects = subjects.map(subject => ({\r\n            ...subject,\r\n            isEnrolled: subject.isEnrolled || false\r\n          }));\r\n          \r\n          console.log('Processed subjects:', this.subjects);\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n          \r\n          // Log enrollment status for debugging\r\n          const enrolledCount = this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n          console.log(`Student is enrolled in ${enrolledCount} subjects`);\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n  filterSubjects() {\r\n    if (this.isStudent()) {\r\n      if (this.viewMode === 'enrolled') {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => s.isEnrolled === true);\r\n        console.log('Enrolled subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => !s.isEnrolled);\r\n        console.log('Available subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      }\r\n    } else {\r\n      this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  setViewMode(mode: 'enrolled' | 'available') {\r\n    this.viewMode = mode;\r\n    this.filterSubjects();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isTeacher(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Teacher' || this.account?.role === 'Admin';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isStudent(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Student' || this.account?.role === 'User';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  openCreateSubjectModal() {\r\n    console.log('Opening create subject modal');\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = null;\r\n    this.subjectForm.reset();\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (!this.modal) {\r\n      this.initializeModal();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  editSubject(subject: any) {\r\n    console.log('Editing subject:', subject);\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Edit Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = subject;\r\n    this.subjectForm.patchValue({\r\n      subjectName: subject.subjectName,\r\n      subjectCode: subject.subjectCode,\r\n      description: subject.description || '',\r\n      schedule: subject.schedule || '',\r\n      room: subject.room || ''\r\n    });\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  saveSubject() {\r\n    this.submitted = true;\r\n\r\n    if (this.subjectForm.invalid) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    this.submitting = true;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.editingSubject) {\r\n      this.subjectService.update(this.editingSubject.subjectId, this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n            console.log('Subject updated:', response);\r\n            this.alertService.success('Subject updated successfully');\r\n            this.modal.hide();\r\n            this.loadSubjects();\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          }\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\nenrollSubject(subject: any) {\r\n  if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to enroll in ${subject.subjectName}?`)) lightgrey: \"EBE7E3\",\n  darkgrey: \"6D7891\"\n};\n/** @type {HTMLIFrameElement | null | undefined} */\n\nvar iframeContainerElement;\n/** @type {HTMLDivElement | null | undefined} */\n\nvar containerElement;\n/** @type {Array<(element: HTMLDivElement) => void>} */\n\nvar onLoadQueue = [];\n/** @type {TrustedTypePolicy | undefined} */\n\nvar overlayTrustedTypesPolicy;\nansiHTML.setColors(colors);\n/**\n * @param {string | null} trustedTypesPolicyName\n */\n\nfunction createContainer(trustedTypesPolicyName) {\n  // Enable Trusted Types if they are available in the current browser.\n  if (window.trustedTypes) {\n    overlayTrustedTypesPolicy = window.trustedTypes.createPolicy(trustedTypesPolicyName || \"webpack-dev-server#overlay\", {\n      createHTML: function createHTML(value) {\n        return value;\n      }\n    });\n  }\n  iframeContainerElement = document.createElement(\"iframe\");\n  iframeContainerElement.id = \"webpack-dev-server-client-overlay\";\n  iframeContainerElement.src = \"about:blank\";\n  iframeContainerElement.style.position = \"fixed\";\n  iframeContainerElement.style.left = 0;\n  iframeContainerElement.style.top = 0;\n  iframeContainerElement.style.right = 0;\n  iframeContainerElement.style.bottom = 0;\n  iframeContainerElement.style.width = \"100vw\";\n  iframeContainerElement.style.height = \"100vh\";\n  iframeContainerElement.style.border = \"none\";\n  iframeContainerElement.style.zIndex = 9999999999;\n  iframeContainerElement.onload = function () {\n    containerElement = /** @type {Document} */\n\n    /** @type {HTMLIFrameElement} */\n    iframeContainerElement.contentDocument.createElement(\"div\");\n    containerElement.id = \"webpack-dev-server-client-overlay-div\";\n    containerElement.style.position = \"fixed\";\n    containerElement.style.boxSizing = \"border-box\";\n    containerElement.style.left = 0;\n    containerElement.style.top = 0;\n    containerElement.style.right = 0;\n    containerElement.style.bottom = 0;\n    containerElement.style.width = \"100vw\";\n    containerElement.style.height = \"100vh\";\n    containerElement.style.backgroundColor = \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85)\";\n    containerElement.style.color = \"#E8E8E8\";\n    containerElement.style.fontFamily = \"Menlo, Consolas, monospace\";\n    containerElement.style.fontSize = \"large\";\n    containerElement.style.padding = \"2rem\";\n    containerElement.style.lineHeight = \"1.2\";\n    containerElement.style.whiteSpace = \"pre-wrap\";\n    containerElement.style.overflow = \"auto\";\n    var headerElement = document.createElement(\"span\");\n    headerElement.innerText = \"Compiled with problems:\";\n    var closeButtonElement = document.createElement(\"button\");\n    closeButtonElement.innerText = \"X\";\n    closeButtonElement.style.background = \"transparent\";\n    closeButtonElement.style.border = \"none\";\n    closeButtonElement.style.fontSize = \"20px\";\n    closeButtonElement.style.fontWeight = \"bold\";\n    closeButtonElement.style.color = \"white\";\n    closeButtonElement.style.cursor = \"pointer\";\n    closeButtonElement.style.cssFloat = \"right\"; // @ts-ignore\n\n    closeButtonElement.style.styleFloat = \"right\";\n    closeButtonElement.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n      hide();\n    });\n    containerElement.appendChild(headerElement);\n    containerElement.appendChild(closeButtonElement);\n    containerElement.appendChild(document.createElement(\"br\"));\n    containerElement.appendChild(document.createElement(\"br\"));\n    /** @type {Document} */\n\n    /** @type {HTMLIFrameElement} */\n    iframeContainerElement.contentDocument.body.appendChild(containerElement);\n    onLoadQueue.forEach(function (onLoad) {\n      onLoad( /** @type {HTMLDivElement} */\n      containerElement);\n    });\n    onLoadQueue = [];\n    /** @type {HTMLIFrameElement} */\n\n    iframeContainerElement.onload = null;\n  };\n  document.body.appendChild(iframeContainerElement);\n}\n/**\n * @param {(element: HTMLDivElement) => void} callback\n * @param {string | null} trustedTypesPolicyName\n */\n\nfunction ensureOverlayExists(callback, trustedTypesPolicyName) {\n  if (containerElement) {\n    // Everything is ready, call the callback right away.\n    callback(containerElement);\n    return;\n  }\n  onLoadQueue.push(callback);\n  if (iframeContainerElement) {\n    return;\n  }\n  createContainer(trustedTypesPolicyName);\n} // Successful compilation.\n\nfunction hide() {\n  if (!iframeContainerElement) {\n    return;\n  } // Clean up and reset internal state.\n\n  document.body.removeChild(iframeContainerElement);\n  iframeContainerElement = null;\n  containerElement = null;\n}\n/**\n * @param {string} type\n * @param {string  | { file?: string, moduleName?: string, loc?: string, message?: string }} item\n * @returns {{ header: string, body: string }}\n */\n\nfunction formatProblem(type, item) {\n  var header = type === \"warning\" ? \"WARNING\" : \"ERROR\";\n  var body = \"\";\n  if (typeof item === \"string\") {\n    body += item;\n  } else {\n    var file = item.file || \"\"; // eslint-disable-next-line no-nested-ternary\n\n    var moduleName = item.moduleName ? item.moduleName.indexOf(\"!\") !== -1 ? \"\".concat(item.moduleName.replace(/^(\\s|\\S)*!/, \"\"), \" (\").concat(item.moduleName, \")\") : \"\".concat(item.moduleName) : \"\";\n    var loc = item.loc;\n    header += \"\".concat(moduleName || file ? \" in \".concat(moduleName ? \"\".concat(moduleName).concat(file ? \" (\".concat(file, \")\") : \"\") : file).concat(loc ? \" \".concat(loc) : \"\") : \"\");\n    body += item.message || \"\";\n  }\n  return {\n    header: header,\n    body: body\n  };\n} // Compilation with errors (e.g. syntax error or missing modules).\n\n/**\n * @param {string} type\n * @param {Array<string  | { file?: string, moduleName?: string, loc?: string, message?: string }>} messages\n * @param {string | null} trustedTypesPolicyName\n */\n\nfunction show(type, messages, trustedTypesPolicyName) {\n  ensureOverlayExists(function () {\n    messages.forEach(function (message) {\n      var entryElement = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      var typeElement = document.createElement(\"span\");\n      var _formatProblem = formatProblem(type, message),\n        header = _formatProblem.header,\n        body = _formatProblem.body;\n      typeElement.innerText = header;\n      typeElement.style.color = \"#\".concat(colors.red); // Make it look similar to our terminal.\n\n      var text = ansiHTML(encode(body));\n      var messageTextNode = document.createElement(\"div\");\n      messageTextNode.innerHTML = overlayTrustedTypesPolicy ? overlayTrustedTypesPolicy.createHTML(text) : text;\n      entryElement.appendChild(typeElement);\n      entryElement.appendChild(document.createElement(\"br\"));\n      entryElement.appendChild(document.createElement(\"br\"));\n      entryElement.appendChild(messageTextNode);\n      entryElement.appendChild(document.createElement(\"br\"));\n      entryElement.appendChild(document.createElement(\"br\"));\n      /** @type {HTMLDivElement} */\n\n      containerElement.appendChild(entryElement);\n    });\n  }, trustedTypesPolicyName);\n}\nexport { formatProblem, show, hide {"ast":null,"code":"/**\n * @param {{ protocol?: string, auth?: string, hostname?: string, port?: string, pathname?: string, search?: string, hash?: string, slashes?: boolean }} objURL\n * @returns {string}\n */\nfunction format(objURL) {\n  var protocol = objURL.protocol || \"\";\n  if (protocol && protocol.substr(-1) !== \":\") {\n    protocol += \":\";\n  }\n  var auth = objURL.auth || \"\";\n  if (auth) {\n    auth = encodeURIComponent(auth);\n    auth = auth.replace(/%3A/i, \":\");\n    auth += \"@\";\n  }\n  var host = \"\";\n  if (objURL.hostname) {\n    host = auth + (objURL.hostname.indexOf(\":\") === -1 ? objURL.hostname : \"[\".concat(objURL.hostname, \"]\"));\n    if (objURL.port) {\n      host += \":\".concat(objURL.port);\n    }\n  }\n  var pathname = objURL.pathname || \"\";\n  if (objURL.slashes) {\n    host = \"//\".concat(host || \"\");\n    if (pathname && pathname.charAt(0) !== \"/\") {\n      pathname = \"/\".concat(pathname);\n    }\n  } else if (!host) {\n    host = \"\";\n  }\n  var search = objURL.search || \"\";\n  if (search && search.charAt(0) !== \"?\") {\n    search = \"?\".concat(search);\n  }\n  var hash = objURL.hash || \"\";\n  if (hash && hash.charAt(0) !== \"#\") {\n    hash = \"#\".concat(hash);\n  }\n  pathname = pathname.replace(/[?#]/g,\n  /**\n   * @param {string} match\n   * @returns {string}\n   */\n  function (match) {\n    return encodeURIComponent(match);\n  });\n  search = search.replace(\"#\", \"%23\");\n  return \"\".concat(protocol).concat(host).concat(pathname).concat(search).concat(hash);\n}\n/**\n * @param {URL & { fromCurrentScript?: boolean }} parsedURL\n * @returns {string}\n */\n\nfunction createSocketURL(parsedURL) {\n  var hostname = parsedURL.hostname; // Node.js module parses it as `::`\n  // `new URL(urlString, [baseURLString])` parses it as '[::]'\n\n  var isInAddrAny = hostname === \"0.0.0.0\" || hostname === \"::\" || hostname === \"[::]\"; // why do we need this check?\n  // hostname n/a for file protocol (example, when using electron, ionic)\n  // see: https://github.com/webpack/webpack-dev-server/pull/384\n\n  if (isInAddrAny && self.location.hostname && self.location.protocol.indexOf(\"http\") === 0) {\n    hostname = self.location.hostname;\n  }\n  var socketURLProtocol = parsedURL.protocol || self.location.protocol; // When https is used in the app, secure web sockets are always necessary because the browser doesn't accept non-secure web sockets.\n\n  if (socketURLProtocol === \"auto:\" || hostname && isInAddrAny && self.location.protocol === \"https:\") {\n    socketURLProtocol = self.location.protocol;\n  }\n  socketURLProtocol = socketURLProtocol.replace(/^(?:http|.+-extension|file)/i, \"ws\");\n  var socketURLAuth = \"\"; // `new URL(urlString, [baseURLstring])` doesn't have `auth` property\n  // Parse authentication credentials in case we need them\n\n  if (parsedURL.username) {\n    socketURLAuth = parsedURL.username; // Since HTTP basic authentication does not allow empty username,\n    // we only include password if the username is not empty.\n\n    if (parsedURL.password) {\n      // Result: <username>:<password>\n      socketURLAuth = socketURLAuth.concat(\":\", parsedURL.password);\n    }\n  } // In case the host is a raw IPv6 address, it can be enclosed in\n  // the brackets as the brackets are needed in the final URL string.\n  // Need to remove those as url.format blindly adds its own set of brackets\n  // if the host string contains colons. That would lead to non-working\n  // double brackets (e.g. [[::]]) host\n  //\n  // All of these web socket url params are optionally passed in through resourceQuery,\n  // so we need to fall back to the default if they are not provided\n\n  var socketURLHostname = (hostname || self.location.hostname || \"localhost\").replace(/^\\[(.*)\\]$/, \"$1\");\n  var socketURLPort = parsedURL.port;\n  if (!socketURLPort || socketURLPort === \"0\") {\n    socketURLPort = self.location.port;\n  } // If path is provided it'll be passed in via the resourceQuery as a\n  // query param so it has to be parsed out of the querystring in order for the\n  // client to open the socket to the correct location.\n\n  var socketURLPathname = \"/ws\";\n  if (parsedURL.pathname && !parsedURL.fromCurrentScript) {\n    socketURLPathname = parsedURL.pathname;\n  }\n  return format({\n    protocol: socketURLProtocol,\n    auth: socketURLAuth,\n    hostname: socketURLHostname,\n    port: socketURLPort,\n    pathname: socketURLPathname,\n    slashes: true\n  });\n}\nexport default '@angular/core';\r\nimport { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms';\r\nimport { Router } from '@angular/router';\r\nimport { first } from 'rxjs/operators';\r\nimport { SubjectService } from '@app/_services/subject.service';\r\nimport { AccountService, AlertService } from '@app/_services';\r\nimport { Account } from '@app/_models';\r\n\r\ndeclare var bootstrap: any;\r\n\r\n@Component({\r\n  selector: 'app-subjects',\r\n  templateUrl: './subjects.component.html',\r\n  styleUrls: ['./subjects.component.css']\r\n})\r\nexport class SubjectsComponent implements OnInit, AfterViewInit {\r\n  subjects: any[] = [];\r\n  filteredSubjects: any[] = [];\r\n  loading = true;\r\n  account: Account | null;\r\n  viewMode: 'enrolled' | 'available' = 'enrolled'; // Default to enrolled\r\n  \r\n  // Modal\r\n  modal: any;\r\n  modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n  subjectForm!: FormGroup;\r\n  submitting = false;\r\n  submitted = false;\r\n  editingSubject: any = null;\r\n\r\nconstructor(\r\n  private subjectService: SubjectService,\r\n  private accountService: AccountService,\r\n  private alertService: AlertService,\r\n  private formBuilder: FormBuilder,\r\n  private router: Router\r\n) {\r\n  this.account = this.accountService.accountValue;\r\n  \r\n  // Debug the service\r\n  console.log('SubjectService constructor check:', {\r\n    service: this.subjectService,\r\n    getAllType: typeof this.subjectService?.getAll,\r\n    getAllExists: !!this.subjectService?.getAll,\r\n    getMySubjectsExists: !!this.subjectService?.getMySubjects\r\n  });\r\n  \r\n  // If getAll is missing, try to reassign from window (temporary fix)\r\n  if (this.subjectService && typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n    console.warn('getAll method missing, attempting to fix...');\r\n    // This is a hack - in a real app, we'd need to find the root cause\r\n    setTimeout(() => {\r\n      console.log('Delayed service check:', {\r\n        service: this.subjectService,\r\n        getAll: this.subjectService?.getAll\r\n      });\r\n    }, 1000);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Add to constructor or ngOnInit\r\nngOnInit() {\r\n  console.log('Current logged-in user:', this.account);\r\n  console.log('User AccountId:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n  console.log('User Role:', this.account?.role);\r\n  \r\n  this.initForm();\r\n  this.loadSubjects();\r\n}\r\n\r\n  ngAfterViewInit() {\r\n    this.initializeModal();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initializeModal() {\r\n    const modalElement = document.getElementById('subjectModal');\r\n    if (modalElement) {\r\n      this.modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement, {\r\n        backdrop: 'static',\r\n        keyboard: false\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initForm() {\r\n    this.subjectForm = this.formBuilder.group({\r\n      subjectName: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      subjectCode: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      description: [''],\r\n      schedule: [''],\r\n      room: ['']\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  get f() { return this.subjectForm.controls; }\r\n\r\nloadSubjects() {\r\n  this.loading = true;\r\n  \r\n  // Add defensive check\r\n  if (!this.subjectService) {\r\n    console.error('SubjectService is not initialized');\r\n    this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n    this.loading = false;\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  \r\n  if (this.isTeacher()) {\r\n    // Teachers see all subjects they teach\r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getMySubjects !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getMySubjects is not a function');\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service method error');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getMySubjects()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Loaded subjects for teacher:', subjects);\r\n          this.subjects = subjects;\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  } else {\r\n    // Students see all subjects with enrollment status\r\n    console.log('Loading subjects for student with ID:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n    \r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getAll is not a function on subjectService', this.subjectService);\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getAll()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Raw subjects from API:', subjects);\r\n          \r\n          // Add isEnrolled flag if not present\r\n          this.subjects = subjects.map(subject => ({\r\n            ...subject,\r\n            isEnrolled: subject.isEnrolled || false\r\n          }));\r\n          \r\n          console.log('Processed subjects:', this.subjects);\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n          \r\n          // Log enrollment status for debugging\r\n          const enrolledCount = this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n          console.log(`Student is enrolled in ${enrolledCount} subjects`);\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n  filterSubjects() {\r\n    if (this.isStudent()) {\r\n      if (this.viewMode === 'enrolled') {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => s.isEnrolled === true);\r\n        console.log('Enrolled subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => !s.isEnrolled);\r\n        console.log('Available subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      }\r\n    } else {\r\n      this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  setViewMode(mode: 'enrolled' | 'available') {\r\n    this.viewMode = mode;\r\n    this.filterSubjects();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isTeacher(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Teacher' || this.account?.role === 'Admin';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isStudent(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Student' || this.account?.role === 'User';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  openCreateSubjectModal() {\r\n    console.log('Opening create subject modal');\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = null;\r\n    this.subjectForm.reset();\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (!this.modal) {\r\n      this.initializeModal();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  editSubject(subject: any) {\r\n    console.log('Editing subject:', subject);\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Edit Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = subject;\r\n    this.subjectForm.patchValue({\r\n      subjectName: subject.subjectName,\r\n      subjectCode: subject.subjectCode,\r\n      description: subject.description || '',\r\n      schedule: subject.schedule || '',\r\n      room: subject.room || ''\r\n    });\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  saveSubject() {\r\n    this.submitted = true;\r\n\r\n    if (this.subjectForm.invalid) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    this.submitting = true;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.editingSubject) {\r\n      this.subjectService.update(this.editingSubject.subjectId, this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n            console.log('Subject updated:', response);\r\n            this.alertService.success('Subject updated successfully');\r\n            this.modal.hide();\r\n            this.loadSubjects();\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          },\r\n          error: (error: any) => {\r\n            console.error('Error updating subject:', error);\r\n            this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to update subject');\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          }\r\n        });\r\n    } else {\r\n      console.log('Creating subject:', this.subjectForm.value);\r\n      this.subjectService.create(this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n            console.log('Subject created:', response);\r\n            this.alertService.success('Subject created successfully');\r\n            this.modal.hide();\r\n            this.loadSubjects();\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          },\r\n          error: (error: any) => {\r\n            console.error('Error creating subject:', error);\r\n            this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to create subject');\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          }\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\nenrollSubject(subject: any) {\r\n  if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to enroll in ${subject.subjectName}?`)) {\r\n    console.log('Enrolling in subject:', subject); // Add this log\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.enroll(subject.subjectId)\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (response) => {\r\n          console.log('Enroll response:', response); // Add this log\r\n          this.alertService.success(`Successfully enrolled in ${subject.subjectName}`);\r\n          \r\n          // Force reload from server\r\n          this.loadSubjects();\r\n          \r\n          // Switch to enrolled view\r\n          if (this.isStudent()) {\r\n            this.viewMode = 'enrolled';\r\n          }\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error enrolling:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to enroll');\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n  // Add these helper methods\r\ngetEnrolledCount(): number {\r\n  return this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n}\r\n\r\ngetAvailableCount(): number {\r\n  return this.subjects.filter(s => !s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n}\r\n\r\n  viewSubject(subject: any) {\r\n    this.router.navigate(['/classroom/subject', subject.subjectId], {\r\n      state: { subject: subject }\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n}","<div class=\"subjects-container\">\r\n  <!-- Header -->\r\n  <div Subjects\r\n      </h1>\r\n      <p class=\"text-secondary\">\r\n        {{ isTeacher() ? 'Manage your subjects' : 'Browse and enroll in subjects' }}\r\n      </p>\r\n    </div>\r\n    <div class=\"d-flex gap-2\">\r\n      <!-- Link to view all questions -->\r\n      <a {"ast":null,"code":"import { AsyncAction } from './AsyncAction';\nexport class QueueAction extends AsyncAction {\n  constructor(scheduler, work) {\n    super(scheduler, work);\n    this.scheduler = scheduler;\n    this.work = work;\n  }\n  schedule(state, delay = 0) {\n    if (delay > 0) {\n      return super.schedule(state, delay);\n    }\n    this.delay = delay;\n    this.state = state;\n    this.scheduler.flush(this);\n    return this;\n  }\n  execute(state, delay) {\n    return delay > 0 || this.closed ? super.execute(state, delay) : this._execute(state, delay);\n  }\n  requestAsyncId(scheduler, id, delay = 0) {\n    if (delay != null && delay > 0 || delay == null && this.delay > 0) {\n      return super.requestAsyncId(scheduler, id, delay);\n    }\n    scheduler.flush(this);\n    return 0;\n  }\n}","map":{"version":3,"names":["AsyncAction","QueueAction","constructor","scheduler","work","schedule","state","delay","flush","execute","closed","_execute","requestAsyncId","id"],"sources":["C:/Users/MY PC/OneDrive/Documents/JAVA/Extra/offLineBoilerPlateAngular-main/node_modules/rxjs/dist/esm/internal/scheduler/QueueAction.js"],"sourcesContent":["import { AsyncAction } from './AsyncAction';\nexport class QueueAction extends AsyncAction {\n    constructor(scheduler, work) {\n        super(scheduler, work);\n        this.scheduler = scheduler;\n        this.work = work;\n    }\n    schedule(state, delay = 0) {\n        if (delay > 0) {\n            return super.schedule(state, delay);\n        }\n        this.delay = delay;\n        this.state = state;\n        this.scheduler.flush(this);\n        return this;\n    }\n    execute(state, delay) {\n        return delay > 0 || this.closed ? any;\r\n\r\n@Component({\r\n  selector: 'app-subjects',\r\n  templateUrl: './subjects.component.html',\r\n  styleUrls: ['./subjects.component.css']\r\n})\r\nexport class SubjectsComponent implements OnInit, AfterViewInit {\r\n  subjects: any[] = [];\r\n  filteredSubjects: any[] = [];\r\n  loading = true;\r\n  account: Account | null;\r\n  viewMode: 'enrolled' | 'available' = 'enrolled'; // Default to enrolled\r\n  \r\n  // Modal\r\n  modal: any;\r\n  modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n  subjectForm!: FormGroup;\r\n  submitting = false;\r\n  submitted = false;\r\n  editingSubject: any = null;\r\n\r\nconstructor(\r\n  private subjectService: SubjectService,\r\n  private accountService: AccountService,\r\n  private alertService: AlertService,\r\n  private formBuilder: FormBuilder,\r\n  private router: Router\r\n) {\r\n  this.account = this.accountService.accountValue;\r\n  \r\n  // Debug the service\r\n  console.log('SubjectService constructor check:', {\r\n    service: this.subjectService,\r\n    getAllType: typeof this.subjectService?.getAll,\r\n    getAllExists: !!this.subjectService?.getAll,\r\n    getMySubjectsExists: !!this.subjectService?.getMySubjects\r\n  });\r\n  \r\n  // If getAll is missing, try to reassign from window (temporary fix)\r\n  if (this.subjectService && typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n    console.warn('getAll method missing, attempting to fix...');\r\n    // This is a hack - in a real app, we'd need to find the root cause\r\n    setTimeout(() => {\r\n      console.log('Delayed service check:', {\r\n        service: this.subjectService,\r\n        getAll: this.subjectService?.getAll\r\n      });\r\n    }, 1000);\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Add to constructor or ngOnInit\r\nngOnInit() {\r\n  console.log('Current logged-in user:', this.account);\r\n  console.log('User AccountId:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n  console.log('User Role:', this.account?.role);\r\n  \r\n  this.initForm();\r\n  this.loadSubjects();\r\n}\r\n\r\n  ngAfterViewInit() {\r\n    this.initializeModal();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initializeModal() {\r\n    const modalElement = document.getElementById('subjectModal');\r\n    if (modalElement) {\r\n      this.modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement, {\r\n        backdrop: 'static',\r\n        keyboard: false\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  initForm() {\r\n    this.subjectForm = this.formBuilder.group({\r\n      subjectName: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      subjectCode: ['', Validators.required],\r\n      description: [''],\r\n      schedule: [''],\r\n      room: ['']\r\n    });\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  get f() { return this.subjectForm.controls; }\r\n\r\nloadSubjects() {\r\n  this.loading = true;\r\n  \r\n  // Add defensive check\r\n  if (!this.subjectService) {\r\n    console.error('SubjectService is not initialized');\r\n    this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n    this.loading = false;\r\n    return;\r\n  }\r\n  \r\n  if (this.isTeacher()) {\r\n    // Teachers see all subjects they teach\r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getMySubjects !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getMySubjects is not a function');\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service method error');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getMySubjects()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Loaded subjects for teacher:', subjects);\r\n          this.subjects = subjects;\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  } else {\r\n    // Students see all subjects with enrollment status\r\n    console.log('Loading subjects for student with ID:', this.account?.AccountId);\r\n    \r\n    if (typeof this.subjectService.getAll !== 'function') {\r\n      console.error('getAll is not a function on subjectService', this.subjectService);\r\n      this.alertService.error('Service error: Please refresh the page');\r\n      this.loading = false;\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.getAll()\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (subjects: any[]) => {\r\n          console.log('Raw subjects from API:', subjects);\r\n          \r\n          // Add isEnrolled flag if not present\r\n          this.subjects = subjects.map(subject => ({\r\n            ...subject,\r\n            isEnrolled: subject.isEnrolled || false\r\n          }));\r\n          \r\n          console.log('Processed subjects:', this.subjects);\r\n          this.filterSubjects();\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n          \r\n          // Log enrollment status for debugging\r\n          const enrolledCount = this.subjects.filter(s => s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n          console.log(`Student is enrolled in ${enrolledCount} subjects`);\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error loading subjects:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error('Failed to load subjects');\r\n          this.loading = false;\r\n        }\r\n      });\r\n  }\r\n}\r\n\r\n  filterSubjects() {\r\n    if (this.isStudent()) {\r\n      if (this.viewMode === 'enrolled') {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => s.isEnrolled === true);\r\n        console.log('Enrolled subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      } else {\r\n        this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects.filter((s: any) => !s.isEnrolled);\r\n        console.log('Available subjects:', this.filteredSubjects); // Debug log\r\n      }\r\n    } else {\r\n      this.filteredSubjects = this.subjects;\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  setViewMode(mode: 'enrolled' | 'available') {\r\n    this.viewMode = mode;\r\n    this.filterSubjects();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isTeacher(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Teacher' || this.account?.role === 'Admin';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  isStudent(): boolean {\r\n    return this.account?.role === 'Student' || this.account?.role === 'User';\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  openCreateSubjectModal() {\r\n    console.log('Opening create subject modal');\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Create Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = null;\r\n    this.subjectForm.reset();\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (!this.modal) {\r\n      this.initializeModal();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  editSubject(subject: any) {\r\n    console.log('Editing subject:', subject);\r\n    this.modalTitle = 'Edit Subject';\r\n    this.editingSubject = subject;\r\n    this.subjectForm.patchValue({\r\n      subjectName: subject.subjectName,\r\n      subjectCode: subject.subjectCode,\r\n      description: subject.description || '',\r\n      schedule: subject.schedule || '',\r\n      room: subject.room || ''\r\n    });\r\n    this.submitted = false;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.modal) {\r\n      this.modal.show();\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  saveSubject() {\r\n    this.submitted = true;\r\n\r\n    if (this.subjectForm.invalid) {\r\n      return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    this.submitting = true;\r\n    \r\n    if (this.editingSubject) {\r\n      this.subjectService.update(this.editingSubject.subjectId, this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n            console.log('Subject updated:', response);\r\n            this.alertService.success('Subject updated successfully');\r\n            this.modal.hide();\r\n            this.loadSubjects();\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          },\r\n          error: (error: any) => {\r\n            console.error('Error updating subject:', error);\r\n            this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to update subject');\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          }\r\n        });\r\n    } else {\r\n      console.log('Creating subject:', this.subjectForm.value);\r\n      this.subjectService.create(this.subjectForm.value)\r\n        .pipe(first())\r\n        .subscribe({\r\n          next: (response: any) => {\r\n            console.log('Subject created:', response);\r\n            this.alertService.success('Subject created successfully');\r\n            this.modal.hide();\r\n            this.loadSubjects();\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          },\r\n          error: (error: any) => {\r\n            console.error('Error creating subject:', error);\r\n            this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to create subject');\r\n            this.submitting = false;\r\n          }\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n  }\r\n\r\nenrollSubject(subject: any) {\r\n  if (confirm(`Are you sure you want to enroll in ${subject.subjectName}?`)) {\r\n    console.log('Enrolling in subject:', subject); // Add this log\r\n    \r\n    this.subjectService.enroll(subject.subjectId)\r\n      .pipe(first())\r\n      .subscribe({\r\n        next: (response) => {\r\n          console.log('Enroll response:', response); // Add this log\r\n          this.alertService.success(`Successfully enrolled in ${subject.subjectName}`);\r\n          \r\n          // Force reload from server\r\n          this.loadSubjects();\r\n          \r\n          // Switch to enrolled view\r\n          if (this.isStudent()) {\r\n            this.viewMode = 'enrolled';\r\n          }\r\n        },\r\n        error: (error: any) => {\r\n          console.error('Error enrolling:', error);\r\n          this.alertService.error(error.message || 'Failed to s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n}\r\n\r\ngetAvailableCount(): number {\r\n  return this.subjects.filter(s => !s.isEnrolled).length;\r\n}\r\n\r\n  viewSubject(subject: any) {\r\n # angular-15-signup-verification-boilerplate

Angular 15 Auth Boilerplate - Sign Up with Verification, Login and Forgot Password

Documentation at https://jasonwatmore.com/angular-15-auth-boilerplate-sign-up-with-verification-login-and-forgot-password

import { NgModule } from '@angular/core';
import { Routes, RouterModule } from '@angular/router';

import { LayoutComponent } from './layout.component';
import { LoginComponent } from './login.component';
import { RegisterComponent } from './register.component';
import { VerifyEmailComponent } from './verify-email.component';
import { ForgotPasswordComponent } from './forgot-password.component';
import { ResetPasswordComponent } from './reset-password.component';

const routes: Routes = [
    {
        path: '', component: LayoutComponent,
        children: [
            { path: 'login', component: LoginComponent },
            { path: 'register', component: RegisterComponent },
            { path: 'verify-email', component: VerifyEmailComponent },
            { path: 'forgot-password', component: ForgotPasswordComponent },
            { path: 'reset-password', component: ResetPasswordComponent }
        ]
    }
];

@NgModule({
    imports: [RouterModule.forChild(routes)],
    exports: [RouterModule]
})
export class AccountRoutingModule { }

File: src\app\account\forgot-password.component.ts
Size: 1.46 kB
================================================================================

﻿import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
import { first, finalize } from 'rxjs/operators';

import { AccountService, AlertService } from '@app/_services';

@Component({ templateUrl: 'forgot-password.component.html' })
export class ForgotPasswordComponent implements OnInit {
    form!: FormGroup;
    loading = false;
    submitted = false;

    constructor(
        private formBuilder: FormBuilder,
        private accountService: AccountService,
        private alertService: AlertService
    ) { }

    ngOnInit() {
        this.form = this.formBuilder.group({
            email: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.email]]
        });
    }

    // convenience getter for easy access to form fields
    get f() { return this.form.controls; }

    onSubmit() {
        this.submitted = true;

        // reset alerts on submit
        this.alertService.clear();

        // stop here if form is invalid
        if (this.form.invalid) {
            return;
        }

        this.loading = true;
        this.accountService.forgotPassword(this.f.email.value)
            .pipe(first())
            .pipe(finalize(() => this.loading = false))
            .subscribe({
                next: () => this.alertService.success('Please check your email for password reset instructions'),
                error: error => this.alertService.error(error)
            });
    }
}

﻿import { Component } from '@angular/core';
import { Router } from '@angular/router';

import { AccountService } from '@app/_services';

@Component({ templateUrl: 'layout.component.html' })
export class LayoutComponent {
    constructor(
        private router: Router,
        private accountService: AccountService
    ) {
        // redirect to home if already logged in
        if (this.accountService.accountValue) {
            this.router.navigate(['/']);
        }
    }
}

File: src\app\account\login.component.ts
Size: 1.82 kB
================================================================================

﻿import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { Router, ActivatedRoute } from '@angular/router';
import { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
import { first } from 'rxjs/operators';

import { AccountService, AlertService } from '@app/_services';

@Component({ templateUrl: 'login.component.html' })
export class LoginComponent implements OnInit {
    form!: FormGroup;
    submitting = false;
    submitted = false;

    constructor(
        private formBuilder: FormBuilder,
        private route: ActivatedRoute,
        private router: Router,
        private accountService: AccountService,
        private alertService: AlertService
    ) { }

    ngOnInit() {
        this.form = this.formBuilder.group({
            email: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.email]],
            password: ['', Validators.required]
        });
    }

    // convenience getter for easy access to form fields
    get f() { return this.form.controls; }

    onSubmit() {
        this.submitted = true;

        // reset alerts on submit
        this.alertService.clear();

        // stop here if form is invalid
        if (this.form.invalid) {
            return;
        }

        this.submitting = true;
        this.accountService.login(this.f.email.value, this.f.password.value)
            .pipe(first())
            .subscribe({
                next: () => {
                    // get return url from query parameters or default to home page
                    const returnUrl = this.route.snapshot.queryParams['returnUrl'] || '/';
                    this.router.navigateByUrl(returnUrl);
                },
                error: error => {
                    this.alertService.error(error);
                    this.submitting = false;
                }
            });
    }
}

File: src\app\account\register.component.ts
Size: 2.22 kB
================================================================================

﻿import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { Router, ActivatedRoute } from '@angular/router';
import { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
import { first } from 'rxjs/operators';

import { AccountService, AlertService } from '@app/_services';
import { MustMatch } from '@app/_helpers';

@Component({ templateUrl: 'register.component.html' })
export class RegisterComponent implements OnInit {
    form!: FormGroup;
    submitting = false;
    submitted = false;

    constructor(
        private formBuilder: FormBuilder,
        private route: ActivatedRoute,
        private router: Router,
        private accountService: AccountService,
        private alertService: AlertService
    ) { }

    ngOnInit() {
        this.form = this.formBuilder.group({
            title: ['', Validators.required],
            firstName: ['', Validators.required],
            lastName: ['', Validators.required],
            email: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.email]],
            password: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.minLength(6)]],
            confirmPassword: ['', Validators.required],
            acceptTerms: [false, Validators.requiredTrue]
        }, {
            validator: MustMatch('password', 'confirmPassword')
        });
    }

    // convenience getter for easy access to form fields
    get f() { return this.form.controls; }

    onSubmit() {
        this.submitted = true;

        // reset alerts on submit
        this.alertService.clear();

        // stop here if form is invalid
        if (this.form.invalid) {
            return;
        }

        this.submitting = true;
        this.accountService.register(this.form.value)
            .pipe(first())
            .subscribe({
                next: () => {
                    this.alertService.success('Registration successful, please check your email for verification instructions', { keepAfterRouteChange: true });
                    this.router.navigate(['../login'], { relativeTo: this.route });
                },
                error: error => {
                    this.alertService.error(error);
                    this.submitting = false;
                }
            });
    }
}

    </div>
    <form *ngIf="tokenStatus == TokenStatus.Valid" [formGroup]="form" (ngSubmit)="onSubmit()">
        <div class="mb-3">
            <label class="form-label">Password</label>
            <input type="password" formControlName="password" class="form-control" [ngClass]="{ 'is-invalid': submitted && f.password.errors }" />
            <div *ngIf="submitted && f.password.errors" class="invalid-feedback">
                <div *ngIf="f.password.errors.required">Password is required</div>
                <div *ngIf="f.password.errors.minlength">Password must be at least 6 characters</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="mb-3">
            <label class="form-label">Confirm Password</label>
            <input type="password" formControlName="confirmPassword" class="form-control" [ngClass]="{ 'is-invalid': submitted && f.confirmPassword.errors }" />
            <div *ngIf="submitted && f.confirmPassword.errors" class="invalid-feedback">
                <div *ngIf="f.confirmPassword.errors.required">Confirm Password is required</div>
                <div *ngIf="f.confirmPassword.errors.mustMatch">Passwords must match</div>
            </div>

                Reset Password

﻿import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core';
import { Router, ActivatedRoute } from '@angular/router';
import { FormBuilder, FormGroup, Validators } from '@angular/forms';
import { first } from 'rxjs/operators';

import { AccountService, AlertService } from '@app/_services';
import { MustMatch } from '@app/_helpers';

enum TokenStatus {
    Validating,
    Valid,
    Invalid
}

@Component({ templateUrl: 'reset-password.component.html' })
export class ResetPasswordComponent implements OnInit {
    TokenStatus = TokenStatus;
    tokenStatus = TokenStatus.Validating;
    token?: string;
    form!: FormGroup;
    loading = false;
    submitted = false;

    constructor(
        private formBuilder: FormBuilder,
        private route: ActivatedRoute,
        private router: Router,
        private accountService: AccountService,
        private alertService: AlertService
    ) { }

    ngOnInit() {
        this.form = this.formBuilder.group({
            password: ['', [Validators.required, Validators.minLength(6)]],
            confirmPassword: ['', Validators.required],
        }, {
            validator: MustMatch('password', 'confirmPassword')
        });

        const token = this.route.snapshot.queryParams['token'];

        // remove token from url to prevent http referer leakage
        this.router.navigate([], { relativeTo: this.route, replaceUrl: true });

        this.accountService.validateResetToken(token)
            .pipe(first())
            .subscribe({
                next: () => {
                    this.token = token;
                    this.tokenStatus = TokenStatus.Valid;
                },
                error: () => {
                    this.tokenStatus = TokenStatus.Invalid;
                }
            });
    }

    // convenience getter for easy access to form fields
    get f() { return this.form.controls; }

    onSubmit() {
        this.submitted = true;

        // reset alerts on submit
        this.alertService.clear();

        // stop here if form is invalid
        if (this.form.invalid) {
            return;
        }

        this.loading = true;
        this.accountService.resetPassword(this.token!, this.f.password.value, this.f.confirmPassword.value)
            .pipe(first())
            .subscribe({
                next: () => {
                    this.alertService.success('Password reset successful, you can now login', { keepAfterRouteChange: true });
                    this.router.navigate(['../login'], { relativeTo: this.route });
                },
                error: error => {
                    this.alertService.error(error);
                    this.loading = false;
                }
            });
    }
}
